There is a closed class of items that can fill this slot, including only  just  and  right  indicating ease of access, and  way ,  all the way , or (dialectally)  clear  indicating distance and difficulty of access.

The #Theme is the object that moves. It may be an entity that moves under its own power, but it need not be.

The #Source is any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion. While #Source expressions are possible in this frame, they are relatively infrequent.  If present, they often express a general direction from which a #Theme moves, rather than a landmark away from which it moves.
The #Path is any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal.  In this frame, #Path expressions almost always have a via-sense.
The #Goal is any expression that tells where the #Theme ends up, or would end up, as a result of the motion.

A #Manner expression  describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion.  Descriptions of speed, steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

An entity which is a (subordinate) match for #Equiv1 in actual identity, possession relationship, part/whole relationship, or role/filler relationship.

Any description of an event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).
The individual who participates in an action along with others, bringing it about collectively.
An inherent quality of an event.

The #Explanation denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically follows. This often means that the #Explanation causes the target's proposition, but not in all cases.
The region which is between the #Entities or between the #Entity and empty space.
The entity that has a #Boundary.
The joint construal of both #Entities next to the #Boundary.
The relative location of the boundary in respect to the #Entity or #Entities.
It identifies a stable #Bounded_area.  It typically serves as the denotation of nouns.

It is used for the #Name of a bounded area.

An indication of which kind of #Bounded_area the entity is.
A region of space located inside a #Ground.
An entity whose location is relatively well-known and which, thus, can serve as a land-mark to identify the #Interior, #Surface, #Boundary, or #Exterior regions.
The region located outside of, but in contact with, the #Ground.
The region associated with the boundary of the #Ground.
The region which is not located inside or in contact with the #Ground.
The #Speaker is the person who produces a message about a #Topic.
The #Addressee is the person to whom the #Speaker communicated a message.
The #Topic is a positively judged entity or state of affairs with which the #Speaker is associated and about which they talk.

Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of the Speaker that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly).
An act whereby the #Speaker makes a boastful statement.
It is the physical entity or channel used by the #Speaker to transmit the statement.
The state of the #Speaker during the statement.
The time when the statement is made.
It specifies the place where the statement takes place.
A characteristic of the entity or state of affairs denoted by the #Topic which explains why the #Speaker is proud of the association with the #Topic referent.
A description of the state of affairs that redounds to the #Speaker's credit.
It is used for the capacity in which the #Topic entity or state of affairs is judged.
It is the body part or action that conveys the feeling of pride of the #Speaker.

Expressions marked with this extra-thematic FE indicate that the particular Statement event referred to is conceived as embedded within an iterated series of similar events or states. Most expressions of #Particular_iteration indicate which instance of the series is being referred to.
The emotional or physical state of the #Speaker that leads to their speaking.
Degree to which event occurs.

Any description of the event or participants not covered by more specific Frame Elements.
The time at which the breaking apart takes place.
The location at which the breaking apart takes place.
An action, event, or state that enables the event of breaking apart.
The part of the #Whole that is conceived as being broken or taken off from the remaining part of the whole.
The piece that is presented in a less prominent position, and which is the landmark or remaining whole from which #Sub_part breaks off.
It expresses a property of the Parts or components of the #Whole which correlates with the locations (e.g.) of fragmentation on the #Whole.
The time at which the breaking off of the #Sub_part happens.
The location at which the breaking off occurs.
Any description of the event or participants not covered by more specific Frame Elements.
An action, event, or state that enables the event of breaking off.

The location where the #Theme ceases to be confined.

The location to which the #Theme's motion was formerly inhibited.

It signifies that the state of affairs expressed by the main clause (containing the target) occurs or holds, and something other than that state of affairs would be expected given the state of affairs in the concessive clause.
The state of the world when the Releasing event occurs.

The #Agent is a sentient being who physically controls the movement of the #Theme via the carrier, accompanying the #Theme.
<ex><fex name="Agent">Karl</fex> <t>carried</t> the books across the campus to the library.</ex>

#Goal identifies the endpoint of the path.  

<ex>Karl <t>carried</t> the books <fex name="goa">to the library</fex>.</ex>

#Source indicates the beginning of the path along which the #Theme travels.  

<ex>Karl <t>hauled</t> the books <fex name="sou">from the library</fex>  to the office.</ex>

Path along which carrying occurs.
<ex>Karl <t>carried</t> the books <fex name="Path">across the campus</fex>.</ex>

The objects being carried.
<ex>Karl <t>toted</t> <fex name="Theme">the books</fex> to the car.</ex>

The #Constant_location expresses the location of the #Theme relative to the #Carrier.  This relationship holds for the entire length of the carrying event.

<ex>Karl <t>took</t> the books to the library <fex name="CL">in his car</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Karl <t>carried</t> the books to the library <fex name="CL">in his arms</fex>.</ex>
#Area is used for descriprion of a general area in which the carrying action takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular or not to consist of a single, linear path.
#Depictive identifies a phrase describing the #Carrier, #Agent or #Theme.
This FE identifies the #Distance the #Theme is carried.
This FE identifies the #Manner  in which the #Carrier or #Agent carries the #Theme .
The #Speed is the rate at which the carrying or transporting occurs.
The #Purpose for which the #Carrier or #Agent carries the #Theme . <ex>We had to <t>carry</t> the heavy weights all the way to the top of the hill<fex name="Pps">to show our strength</fex>.</ex>

The #Carrier provides support for the #Theme.  Movement of the #Carrier results in movement of the #Theme.
<ex><fex name="Car">The boat</fex> <t>ferried</t> the troops across the river.</ex>

The actions the #Agent takes to move the #Theme.
<ex>The books were <t>taken</t> to the library <fex name="Mns">by helicopter deliveries</fex>.</ex>
<ex>I <t>haul</t> books <fex name="Mns">by putting them on top of my head</fex>.</ex>

The #Place is the general area that serves as a setting for the specific motion of the #Agent and #Theme (with #Source, #Path, or #Goal).  
<ex><fex name="Place">Even in such a small port</fex>, these boats would <t>transport</t> many tons of trade-goods in to shore annually.</ex>
The time in which the carrying event takes place.
#Explanation denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically follows. This often means that the #Explanation causes the target s proposition, but not in all cases.
This FE describes the particpant for whom the bringing is beneficial.
Expressions marked with this extra-thematic FE modify a non-iterative use of the target, and indicate that it is conceived as embedded within an iterated series of similar events or states.
This frame element is used to indicate the location of a participant in cases where the multiple participants of an event are not co-located in the typical fashion.
This frame element selects some gradable attribute and modifies the expected value for it.

Co_participant is an entity that participates in a coordinated way in the same event as the primary protagonist, regardless of whether the protagonist, and hence the <fex name="Co-participant">Co-participant</fex>, is more agent- or more undergoer-like.

Duration denotes the length of time from the beginning of a continuous situation (the one denoted by the target) to its end. In many cases, the continuous situation is a dynamic action which is ongoing, while in others it is simply an undifferentiated state.
This FE is minimally distinct from Duration and Duration_of final_state in that the clause described is conveyed to be iterative.
It identifies the #Degree to which a bungling event occurs.

The number of intervals of the specified type.
The calendric unit that is denoted. LUs in this frame all denote the #Unit.

This FE identifies the #Number.

This FE identifies the #Precision to which an #Entity approximates a #Number.

In the case where a number is modified by a #Multiplier, we have found it more plausible that phrases expressing #Precision modify the main number (thus "million" in the first example, not "two"):

There are just over six BILLION people in the world today.
How many times larger the group of #Entities is than the base #Number.

A #Unit expresses some quantification of some property of an entity, event, or situation by providing a base value of the property combined with a #Number expressing how the current value for the property relates to the #Unit.

She's not even SIX years old yet!

As units that specify a quantity property, numbers themselves can be used as Units.

THREE dozen eggs makes eighteen standard omelettes .

The total number of instances of the #Entity. This FE should be used when more basic number expressions are used together to form a #Composite_number whose value is the sum of the constituent numbers. It is annotated on a second FE layer. For cases where a number is used to multiply another number, use #Multiplier.

She found six HUNDRED and twelve errors in the manuscript.

Four score and SEVEN years ago , I wasn't even born.

THIRTY seven senators refused to vote.

This is the object which moves. In many sentences this FE will be expressed as something which moves under its own power. However, this FE is not <ment>required</ment> to be an animate mover, so it is different from a self-mover.

<ex>At that point <fex name="Thm">the truck in front of me</fex> <t>turned</t> right into the huge ditch/field that separates the interstate from the access road.</ex>

Any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion expresses the frame element #Source. 

<ex>One of those ugly landcuisers <t>cut</t> left <fex name="Src">from the opposite lane</fex> in moving traffic.</ex>

Any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal (see below) expresses the frame element #Path, excluding directional expressions.

<ex>They <t>turned</t> right <fex name="Path">through another gate</fex> into a courtyard opening.</ex>

Any expression which indicates where the #Theme ends up as a result of the change of direction. 

<ex>Finally, where the road begins to climb steeply, <t>cut</t> right <fex name="Goal">onto a small trail near a sign in a tree</fex>, and go downhill to the stream.</ex>.

Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including force (<ment>hard</ment>, <ment>softly</ment>), secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In agentive frames, it may indicate salient characteristics of an intentional Theme that affect the action (<ment>presumptuously</ment>, <ment>coldly</ment>, <ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>, <ment>carefully</ment>).

<ex>I <fex name="Manner">carefully</fex> <t>turned</t> left onto Narragansett and worked my way through the debris.</ex>
An event involving the #Theme that results in the #Theme moving in the specified way.

The #Speed is the rate at which the #Theme changes direction.

<ex>Suddenly, the jeep <fex name="Speed">quickly</fex> <t>turned</t> left down a side road.</ex>

This is the second moving object, expressed as a direct object or an oblique: 


<ex>I <t>turned</t> right <fex name="Thm_c">after them</fex>, closed in on the rear plane but then discovered another plane from the formation nearing me from the right side.</ex>

A phrase describing the state of the Theme during the act of changing direction.


<ex>The big forward picked up speed entering Edmonton s end, <t>cut</t> to the right <fex name="Depictive">with Charlie Huddy draped over him</fex> and left a pass for Lemieux as Stevens battled Kevin Lowe into a screen in front of Fuhr.</ex>

The #Place is the setting where the change of direction during the Theme s motion occurs.

<ex><t>Turn</t> right <fex name="Place">at the stop light</fex> and follow Park Avenue.</ex>

The configuration formed by the #Path that the #Theme traverses during the change of direction.

<ex>The tank rumbled, backed quickly, <t>turned</t> left and right <fex name="Path_shape">in a sine curve</fex>.</ex>

The new direction in which the #Theme continues its motion.

<ex>Eventually, though, I backtracked to Kel Tole and <m>hung</m> a <t><fex name="dir">left</fex></t> toward Kilgal Tole.</ex>

The time at which the change of direction takes place.


<ex><fex name="Time">Then</fex> I <t>turned</t> left onto 220th Street.</ex>
The state-of-affairs that the #Theme wishes to bring about.

The device or bodypart that serves to move the #Theme.

<ex>Go back to where you <t>turned</t> left <fex name="Means_of_motion">in your car</fex> to reach the trailhead.</ex>

A factor which explains the change of direction of the #Theme.



<ex>We ve <t>turned</t> north <fex name="Explanation">because we ve struck desert heading south</fex>.</ex>

An event that occurs or state of affairs that holds at the time the change of direction occurs and which the change of direction is taken to be a part of.

<ex>Anyway, <fex name="con">on my first trip to Wakefield</fex>, I <t>turned</t> right off Falls of Neuse Road, which is generally where the middle-class and upper middle-class houses and apartments are going.</ex>

The number of times that a change of direction occurs.

<ex>They <t>turned</t> right <fex name="Frequency">three times</fex> and approached the sea lions from behind.</ex>

A larger conceptualization that includes the change of direction as an integral part. The change of direction expressed by the target typically corresponds to a Means action in this larger conceptualization. 

<ex>The pilot of N3602D <t>turned</t> left <fex name="Re-encoding">in an attempt to avoid a collision</fex>.</ex>

An unexpected event that affects the #Theme, which is enabled by, and occurs after, the change of direction.

<ex>I have a tendency to shoot straight forward after the initial drop and then <t>cut</t>
to the left <fex name="New_situation">only to meet a knee-high rush of white water</fex>.</ex>

The state of the world (at a particular time and place) which is specifically independent of the change of direction event itself and any of its participants, and is merely peripherally related to the event as a whole.

The angle between the old and the new #Direction in which the #Theme moves.

<ex>There we <t>turned</t> right <fex name="ang">by almost 180 degrees</fex> and by a winding road, going steeply

The #Explanation denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically follows. This often means that the #Explanation causes the target's proposition, but not in all cases.

It indicates that the communication act denoted by the target is in response to an earlier communication act in which the roles of #Speaker and #Addressee were reversed. It identifies the #Time where the Communication noise event occurs.

It identifies the content of what the #Speaker is communicating to the #Addressee. It can be expressed as a direct quote or a clause.
It occurs quite rarely in this frame.

The #Manner of performing an action.
Depictive phrase describing the #Speaker.

The response may be prompted by either some outside phenomenon or occurrence, or by an #Internal_cause, the Agent's mental or emotional state.
The location in which the #Speaker makes a verbal response.
The time interval during which the #Speaker makes their verbal response.

The individual who was convicted of a crime and given a sentence (the #Original_punishment).

It identifies the first (or only) participant in a competition.
It identifies the second participant in a competition.

The #Complainer is the sentient entity that produces the #Complaint (whether spoken or written).
The #Addressee is the person to whom the #Complaint is communicated.
The lamentable situation that the #Complainer is communicating to the #Addressee.
The #Topic is the subject matter to which the #Complaint pertains.

Any description of the complaining event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Complainer that affect the action (presumptuously, bitterly, vociferoursly).
It is defined as the number of times an event occurs per some unit of time.
An act whereby the #Complainer makes a complaint.
The emotional or physical state of the #Complainer that leads to their complaining.
It is the physical entity or channel used by the #Complainer to transmit the #Complaint.
The state of the #Complainer while making the #Complaint.
The time when the complaint is made.
It specifies the place where the complaining takes place.

Expressions marked with this extra-thematic FE indicate that the particular complaining event referred to  is conceived as embedded within an iterated series of similar events or states. Most expressions of #Particular_iteration indicate which instance of the series is being referred to.
The #Degree to which event occurs.
The #Occasion is the reason a public statement is given.

It denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically followes. This often means that the Explanation causes the complaint, but not in all cases. In particular, there are cases when the connection is a bit weaker than normal for causation. In these instances, cause is mediated by some actor responding in a complex way to the situation. Such cases are not paraphrasable in the language of direct causation.
An event or state which results from the complaining.
An expression indicating a deviation of the actual level of completeness from the level indicated by the target.
The entity that is being assessed for having all its necessary parts or not.
The interval of time when the completeness of the entity is assessed.
The #Protagonist's behavior is in or out of compliance with norms.
It identifies the #Act that is judged to be in or out of compliance with the #Norms.
A #State_of_affairs may violate a law or rule.
It identifies the rules or #Norms that ought to guide a person's behavior.
It identifies the #Degree to which the compliance occurs.
It identifies any description of the actor or undergoer.
It identifies the #Manner in which the compliance occurs.
It identifies the #Means by which the compliance is (or is not) accomplished.
It identifies the #Result of compliance.
It identifies the #Time  when the act of compliance or non-compliance occurs.
The #Explanation for complying with the #Norm.
The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

A proposition or set of propositions that the speaker wants the addressee to believe or take for granted. This statement is not asserted, but presupposed by the speaker of the sentence, and is mentioned to contrast with the #Main_assertion. It would or could seem to predict a situation different than the #Main_assertion, but, for reasons left implicit, this normal prediction is contradicted by the fact that the #Main_assertion and the #Conceded_state_of_affairs are both simultaneously true.
An entity which metonymically stands in for an associated #Conceded_state_of_affairs.

The statement that the speaker wishes to assert or offer as their main contribution to the discourse, which is be modified or hedged in some way by the #Conceded_state_of_affairs. The force of the contribution of the #Main_assertion is presented as undiluted by the fact that something different from the #Main_assertion would normally by predicted, based on the facts in the #Conceded_state_of_affairs.
The situation presented explicitly as a possibility, contrasting with the implicit Negated_possibility.
The situation that follows from the #Profiled_possibility.

Pragmatically emphasizes a speaker's assumption of the truth of the #Profiled_possibility for the conversation's duration. This FE does not occur for all LUs in the frame, and is closed-class, limited to the word 'always'.
The situation presented explicitly as a possibility, contrasting with the implicit #Opposite_possibility.
The implicit situation that is mutually exclusive with the #Profiled_possibility.
The situation that follows from the #Profiled_possibility.
The situation that follows as a result of the #Opposite_possibility.
The person who has a #Medical_condition associated with #Symptom.
A holistic description of the medical state of the #Patient (or a part of the state of the #Patient), which may or may not indicate the cause of a deviation from normal.
A deviation from normal function or feeling which is noticed by a #Patient or physician, indicating the presence of a #Medical_condition
Specific type of people in which a #Medical_condition is normally found.
When a #Symptom or #Medical_condition occurs.
The location where a #Medical_condition presents.
The commonality of a #Medical_condition or #Symptom.
The degree to which a #Medical_condition is associated with a #Symptom(s).
It is #Explanation for why a #Symptom(s) or #Medical_condition(s) occur.
Genetic, Biological, and Environmental #Influences affect #Medical_conditions.
It marks expressions that denote the person whose conduct is being evaluated.

The location at which the #Agent exhibits their behavior.

It denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically follows. This often means that the Explanation causes the state of affairs expressed by the target, but not in all cases.

It denotes an event that occurs or state of affairs that holds at a time that includes the time during which the event or state of affairs reported by the target occurs and of which it is taken to be a part.
It denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically follows. This often means that the #Explanation causes the target's proposition, but not in all cases.

The non-point-like entity which has a Boundary which (largely or completely) separates the #Interior region from the Exterior region. It normally also has a #Portal which links the #Interior and Exterior regions.

An open question that is (to some #Degree) predictable from the #Determinant.
An open question that determines the #Outcome.
The amount of predictive power supplied by the #Determinant with respect to the #Outcome.

The conditions under which the #Determinant dictates the #Outcome. Oftentimes it is expressed in a fashion similar to Time and Place in other frames, but such cases are actually metonymic for the prevailing conditions of the Time and/or Place.
A state which holds prior to and up through the #Reference_occasion.
The time or event (normally speech time) with respect to which the #State_of_affairs is located.
Circumstances describe the state of the world (at a particular time and place) which is specifically independent of the event itself and any of its participants.

It indicates the person who experiences the emotion about their prior action.

Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, in particular secondary effects (loudly), general descriptions comparing events (the same way), and salient characteristics of an agent that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

Circumstances describe the state of the world (at a particular time and place) which is specifically independent of the event itself and any of its participants.
It is defined as the number of times an event occurs per some unit of time. A Frequency expression answers the question how often.

This is the entity, frequently a living being, which moves in relation to the #Cotheme.

It marks any expression which implies a definite starting-point of the motion of the #Cotheme. In prepositional phrases, the  object expresses the starting point of motion. With particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.

Any expression which tells where the #Cotheme ends up as a result of the motion expresses the frame element #Goal. Note that if the #Cotheme is animate, the #Theme need not also end up in the same place. Some particles imply the existence of a #Goal which is understood in the context of utterance.

Phrases marked with this frame element  describe a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of the #Theme's motion. Descriptions of steadiness, grace, and other things count as #Manner expressions.

It marks expressions which describe a general area in which the motion of #Theme and #Cotheme takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular and not to consist of a single linear path. Locative setting adjuncts of motion expressions may also be assigned this frame element.

In general, this FE is used for phrases that describe the clause of the target as a whole. There are two somewhat distinct subgroups of sentence modifiers that cover this function. First, it applies to appraisals of the event, typically a judgment of its expectedness. The notion of appraisal requires a factive portrayal of the event. The second subgroup consists of any descriptions of the state of affairs denoted by the target as role fillers in other frames. The state of affairs reported by the target is understood to play a role in the state of affairs of the modifier. What that role is depends only on the predicate heading the modifier phrase.

This is the object which moves. It may be an entity which moves under its own power, but it need not be. <ex><fex name="Theme">The officer</fex> <t>left</t> the house.</ex>

All the verbs in this frame express some change of location, away from one place and to another. Any constituent that expresses the initial position of the #Theme, before the change of location, is tagged with #Source. Often the #Source is understood from context. <ex>The woman <t>left</t>. <fex name="Source">DNI</fex></ex> <ex>The woman <t>left</t> <fex name="Source">the house</fex>.</ex><ex>We <t>departed</t> <fex name="Source">from New York</fex> on Friday.</ex>

Any description of the trajectory of the departure which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal expresses the frame element #Path.  In this frame, #Path expressions almost always have a sense meaning  via . 
<ex>Spiderman <t>left</t> <fex name="Path">through the window</fex>.</ex>

This FE labels any expression which tells where the #Theme ends up, or would end up, as a result of departing from the #Source. <ex>Our visitors <t>left</t> <fex name="Goal">for Los Angeles</fex>.</ex>

Any expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of steadiness, grace, and many other things count as #Manner expressions, though #Speed and #Means should be tagged using the more specific FE labels. <ex>The messenger <t>left</t> the room <fex name="Manner">clumsily</fex>.</ex>
The action of the #Theme which results in its departure. <ex>He <t>retreated</t> from his opponent <fex name="Means">by taking a quick leap backwards</fex>.</ex>
This frame element labels words or phrases that describe how quickly the #Theme is moving. <ex>He <fex name="Speed">quickly</fex> <t>exited</t> the crowded terminal.</ex>

The #Mode_of_transportation expresses how the motion of the #Theme is effected, by its body or by a vehicle which holds and conveys the #Theme. Vehicles can move in any way and in any medium. 

In this frame, #Mode_of_transportation is often expressed obliquely in a prepositional phrase headed by  in  or  by .

<ex>We <t>set</t> <t>out</t> <fex name="Mode_of_transportation">by boat</fex> for Nova Scotia.
</ex><ex>Wilbur <t>departed</t> <fex name="Mode_of_transportation">on foot</fex> for London.</ex>

The #Cotheme is the second moving object, expressed as a prepositional phrase generally headed by  with  or  along with . 
<ex>He <t>left</t> <fex name="Cotheme">along with John</fex>.</ex>
The distance that the #Theme has traveled. <ex>He <t>withdrew</t> <fex name="Distance">a little</fex> from her. </ex>
The #Time at which the departure takes place.<ex>We <t>left</t> <fex name="Time">in the morning</fex>.</ex>
The #Frequency is the rate at which each #Theme departs.
The #Journey is the trip or expedition on which the #Theme embarks. <ex><fex name="Theme">Mr. Burns</fex> <t>departed</t> <fex name="Journey">on a hunting expedition</fex>.</ex>

Any description of the process of destruction which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Destroyer that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).
An intentional action performed by the #Destroyer that accomplishes the destruction.
It identifies the place where the #Destroyer destroys the #Patient.
It identifies the purpose for which a #Destroyer causes the destruction of the #Patient.
A state of affairs that the #Destroyer is responding to in destroying the #Patient.

It identifies the #Result of an event on the #Patient.  This FE is very rare in this frame, and since the #Patient is destroyed by this process, the #Result is generally constrained to indicate the #Patient's resulting inexistence.
The part of the #Patient which is directly affected by the destruction.
It identifies the time when the #Destroyer destroys the #Patient.
The entity which is destroyed by the #Destroyer.
The event or entity which is responsible for the destruction of the #Patient.
The category in which the #Patient is destroyed.
How often the #Cause or #Destroyer destroys the #Patient.

It denotes an event that occurs or state of affairs that holds at a time that includes the time during which the event or state of affairs reported by the target occurs and of which it is taken to be a part.
It describes a participant of the state of affairs introduced by the target as being in some state during the action.
It expresses the #Medium in which the #Patient is destroyed by the #Cause or #Destroyer. This FE is generally used in Metaphorical uses of this frame.
The individual that causes the #Item and #Source to come apart by manipulating the connector.
It identifies the #Item that the #Agent detaches from the #Source.
It identifies the #Result of a detaching event.
It identifies the location to which an #Item was attached before getting detached.
It identifies the plural #Items that are detached from each other, resulting in their separation.
It identifies the #Means by which an #Agent detaches an #Item or #Items.

Any description of the detaching event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Agent that affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).
It identifies the #Place where the #Agent detaches an #Item or #Items.
It identifies the #Purpose for which an #Agent intentionally detaches an #Item or #Items.
It identifies the #Time when the #Agent detaches the #Item from the #Source.

It identifies the #Instrument with which an #Agent detaches an #Item or #Items. Typically, it transmits the force applied by the #Agent, and is not left behind as a participant in the resultant state.
It identifies the #Degree to which the #Item ends up detached.
The #Authorities hold the #Suspect in custody.
It identifies the crime with which the #Suspect is charged.
Where is the detaining place.
It identifies the person who is taken into custody and held, under suspicion of having committed a crime.
When the detaining occurs.
It identifies the place where the #Suspect is confined.
It identifies the length of time that the #Suspect spends in confinement.
It identifies the law, act, or precedent that allows the #Authorities to detain the #Suspect.
It identifies the purpose for which the #Authorities detain a #Suspect.
It identifies the state of the #Suspect being held.
The #Agent detonates the #Explosive.
It identifies the place where the #Agent detonates the #Explosive.
It identifies the purpose for which an #Agent detonates the #Explosive.
It identifies the time when the #Agent detonates the #Explosive.
It identifies the #Means by which an #Agent detonates the #Explosive.

Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully).
The #Explosive causes damage to surrounding objects when operated by the #Agent.
The #Outcome is the failure or success of the #Agent's detonating the #Explosive.
An event within which the #Agent detonates the #Explosive. Often, the #Containing_event will also give an indication of the #Agent's #Purpose.
It is defined as the number of times an event occurs per some unit of time.
It modifies a clause with an iterative interpretation, which may be signified by the simple present tense on the main verb.
Circumstances describe the state of the world (at a particular time and place) which is specifically independent of the event itself and any of its participants.

It describes a participant of the state of affairs introduced by the target as being in some state during the action. The depicted state does not necessarily or usually facilitate or cause the state of affairs reported by the target.
It denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically follows. This often means that the #Explanation causes the target s proposition, but not in all cases.
It selects some gradable attribute of the #Explosive or the detonation act and modifies the expected value for it.

It denotes the length of time from the beginning of a continuous situation to its end. In many cases, the continuous situation is a dynamic action which is ongoing, while in others it is simply an undifferentiated state.
An implement used by the #Agent to detonate the #Explosive.
The #Victim (typically an individual or structure) is targeted by the explosion or inadvertently damaged by the explosion.

It is the person (or other sentient being) who potentially determines that two #Phenomena are distinct from each other.
The phenomena that are potentially judged to be different from one another can be expressed as separate constituents.
The phenomenon expressed less prominently.
Both phenomena that are potentially judged to be different from one another can be expressed jointly by the same constituent.
This is a property that is potentially used by the #Cognizer to distinguish one phenomenon from another.
The #Degree to which event occurs.
A state of a participant while the action is ongoing.
The #Manner of performing an action.
An intentional action performed by the #Cognizer that allows them to differentiate the #Phenomena.
The #Circumstances describe the situation in which the #Cognizer evaluates the #Phenomena.
It marks expressions indicating the #Activity that the #Experiencer finds difficult or easy. In many cases, the relevant #Activity has to be inferred from the context.
It marks expressions that indicate the #Degree of difficulty that the #Experiencer has in carrying out the #Activity.
It marks expressions that indicate a set of conditions in which the #Activity is being experienced and which influence the #Experiencer's perception of how easy or difficult the #Activity is.
It marks expressions that indicate which person judges carrying out the #Activity to be easy or difficult.
It marks expressions that indicate a respect in which the #Activity is judged easy or difficult to carry out by the #Experiencer.
The experience of the #Activity by the #Experiencer may be compared to a #Standard situation, which may be evoked either as an event or state, or by reference to a salient participant.
The time at which the #Activity takes place.
It identifies the #Dimension which is measured.  Most LUs in this frame incorporate the #Dimension.
The #Object identifies the item which is measured along one of its #Dimensions.
The #Measurement identifies the extent of the #Object along the specified #Dimension.
The #Locus identifies the sub-region of the #Object where the #Dimension is measured.
The relevant dimension of development.
FOR REFRAMING!
It refers to places (snack bars, restaurants) and food services (meals) that are offered in a particular place of interest to the tourist.
Individual or group who uses the dining services.
Where the tourist buys the food.
The kind of dining service or establishment.
The point of reference from which the rest of the #Path is reckoned.
The one-dimensional set of locations.
The kind of space in which the set of points of the #Path is defined.
The one-dimensional variable with respect to which the positions on the #Path are reckoned. For normal motion, the positions on the #Path are with respect to time.
How much movement in the stated direction along the #Path from the #Landmark there has been.
The #Ground serves as a basis for describing the location of the #Figure.
The #Figure is perceived as located relative to a certain #Ground location in a certain direction specified by the particular LU. The #Figure can be an entity or an event.

An indication of how accessible the #Figure is to some participant in the speech context (either the speaker or the addressee, or some other highly salient viewpoint in a narrative).  This FE normally describes availability for manipulation and use, but may simply describe how easily seen or difficult to see the #Figure is. There is a closed class of items that can fill this slot, including only  just  and  right  indicating ease of access, and  way  and  all the way  indicating distance and difficulty of access.
It identifies the #Direction from a reference location (generally, the deictic center) of a path to the #Figure. This FE is filled by one of a closed class of adverbs.
The period of time during which the locative relation between #Figure and #Ground obtains.

It identifies the #Distance between the #Figure and the #Ground. It requires an image schema with a vector that extends from the #Ground, or a subpart of the #Ground, in some direction, and the #Distance is measured along this vector from the #Ground to the profiled region.

An indication of how the locative phrase relates to the grounding of the speech situation, either locating it near (here) or far (there, yonder), or specifically separated from the speech context by distance or a barrier (over).  Fillers of this FE are restricted to this closed class of items.
An indication of how closely the position of #Figure matches the prototype expected from the image schema associated with the target. It is normally filled by closed-class, dedicated adverbs.

A description of how the access path to the #Ground interacts with time. It is filled only by the closed class of adverbials. While this FE in its most basic use refers to cases of actual motion, it can be used with descriptions of static position, in which case it either refers to fictive, imagined motion, or it backgrounds motion entirely.
The athlete from the opposing team who suffers the foul.
Area of the venue in which the foul takes place.
The athlete who violates a rule of the game.
When the foul takes place.
The kind of foul.
The individual or group that is responding to a disaster with directed action.
The #Victim (typically a large group) which is affected by the disaster event.
It identifies the place where the #Disaster occurs.
Directed action leading to recovery, rescue, or general mitigation of distress due to an ensuing disaster.
It identifies the time when the disaster scenario occurs.
The length of time between the instantiation of the #Disaster and the conclusion of the #Response.
An event of great proportional magnitude with evidence leaving blame to which only the stars might answer. A disaster is an indisputably ill-fated occurrence.

In cases where the #Interlocutors involved in a conversation are construed as two separate groups with different levels of volitionality or control, this FE identifies the conversational participant with greater semantic and syntactic prominence, as compared with #Interlocutor_2. That is, #Interlocutor_1 is generally encoded as Subject, and peripheral FEs that do not make reference to the event itself generally make reference to #Interlocutor_1.  Thus a #Purpose (or #Means, #Depictive, or #Manner) is construed to be that of #Interlocutor_1, not necessarily that of #Interlocutor_2 or the group of #Interlocutors as a whole.

In cases where the #Interlocutors involved in a conversation are construed as two separate groups with different levels of volitionality or control, #Interlocutor_2 refers to the semantically and grammatically less prominent group.

In some sentences both participants are expressed by the subject. In some sentences, the subject is assigned the #Interlocutors. In such sentences, the subject always denotes more than one person, and it is understood that the reciprocal communication takes place between these two (or more) people. The subject may denote two or more people either through conjunction or through plurality, or by denoting a group. In each of these cases the #Interlocutors is assigned.

It expresses the subject that the #Interlocutors are trying to come to some agreement about.  It may refer, for example, to an undesirable issue that the #Interlocutors want to have the proper response to, or it may refer more directly to an unresolved question.
The linguistic system(s) used by the #Interlocutors to discuss something.
It applies to phrases expressing how thoroughly a #Topic has been discussed.
It identifies a depictive phrase describing #Interlocutor_1 or the pair of #Interlocutors.
It marks phrases that express the #Manner in which one or both of the #Interlocutors communicate.
It marks constituents expressing the means the parties to the conversation use to talk to each other.
The #Duration of the conversation.
The goal that #Interlocutor_1 or the #Interlocutors jointly have, i.e. the state of affairs that they wish to bring about by the conversation.
The time at which the discussion takes place.
The location at which a discussion takes place.
The device or system that facilitates a discussion.
The length of time from when the event denoted by the target began to be repeated to when it stopped.
It denotes an event that occurs or a state of affairs that holds at a time that includes the time during which the discussion takes place and of which it is taken to be part.
The number of times the discussion happens in a given period of time.
The general field or area in which the discussion takes place, or which shapes the discussion or its topic.
Individual or group that is affected by a #Disease during the touristic activity.
Physical or psychological harm that affects the #Tourist when staying at a #Place.
Where #Tourist falls ill.
Individual or group who suffers from the #Disease with the #Tourist.
Why the Tourist is affected by the #Disease.
How long the #Disease lasts.
When the #Disease appears.
How often the #Disease affects the #Tourist.
The starting point of trip. Generally, it is the place where the #Tourist lives and to where she will return after the stay at the touristic destination.
How the illness happens.
Specific features of the #Disease or of the #Tourist.
Kind or cause of the #Disease.
The #Traveller is the entity which disembarks from the #Vehicle.
The #Vehicle is the means of conveyance that the #Traveller disembarks from.
It describes a property of the motion not related to its trajectory.
It describes the trajectory of the #Traveller's motion off or out of the #Vehicle.
The amount of time the #Traveller spends off or outside of the #Vehicle after disembarking from it.
The state of the #Traveller or #Vehicle during the disembarking.
When the disembarking of the #Vehicle takes place.
A theme that leaves the #Vehicle together with the main #Traveller. This may be an entity the #Traveller transports or a co-traveller moving under their own power.
The #Purpose for which the #Traveller disembarks from the vehicle.
The location in which the #Traveller disembarks from the #Vehicle.
The location that the #Traveller reaches by leaving the #Vehicle.
The entity or event which brings disgrace upon the #Protagonist.
The person or organization responsible for the occurrence of the #State_of_affairs.
The extent to which the #State_of_affairs diverges from the social norm for things of its kind.
The #Explanation denotes a proposition from which the judgment of disgrace logically follows.
The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.
The #Agent disperses or scatters the #Individuals.
The #Individuals are scattered by the #Agent.
It is the relatively confined space from which an #Agent scatters the #Individuals.
It identifies the broader space to which the #Agent scatters the #Individuals.
An event or force that causes that #Individuals to disperse.

Any description of the dispersing event  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). With agentive uses, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (eagerly, carefully).
The #Time when the #Individuals are dispersed.
An intentional action performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the dispersal.
A state of the #Individuals that results from the dispersal.
The trajectory along which the #Individuals move.
The #Place where the dispersing event happens.
A state of affairs that the #Agent is responding to in dispersing the #Individuals.
The distance that the #Individuals move from their original location, the #Source.
The rate of motion of the #Individuals, usually in terms of how long it takes for them to leave the #Source and end up in the #Goal_area.
The number of #Units of the linear extent.
The #Stuff whose linear extent is being measured.
The standardized quantity in terms of which other quantities of the same kind are measured.
It marks constituents which express what property is being measured.
The location of the end of the line or curve measuring distance. It is distinct from #Location_2 in being more topical.
The location of the end of the line or curve measuring distance. It is distinct from #Location_1 in being less topical.
The pair or group of locations that delimit the line or curve that measures the #Distance.
The measure of a line or curve from #Location_1 to #Location_2, either quantified by a #Count of #Units or implicitly characterized by the #Degree of deviation from expectation.
The amount to which the #Distance differs from expectation.
The #Bomb is set off by the #Detonator at a distance, injuring or damaging a #Target.
The type of activity that the #Bomb is generally involved in.  Often this can be considered a kind of #Type specification also.
It indicates what subtype of the general category the #Bomb belongs to.
The substance that makes up the #Bomb.
The person that wishes to attack the #Target and who activates the #Bomb.
It identifies a part of the #Bomb. This includes parts that aid in the detonation or damaging, or mere attachments.
The term used to refer to the #Bomb.
The time at which a #Bomb comes into existence.
The individual or group responsible for the creation of the #Bomb.
A description or characteristic of the #Bomb not covered by more specific FEs.
The intended or actual target of the #Bomb.
The aspect of the #Entity which makes it different from the other members of its class.
The item which differs from other members of its class in the #Feature's value.
The extent to which the values of the Feature of the Entity and the Comparison_set are similar to each other.

Duration denotes the length of time from the beginning of a continuous situation to its end. In many cases, the continuous situation is a dynamic action which is ongoing, while in others it is simply an undifferentiated state.
It covers or fills the #Location.
It is the object or area that the #Theme fills or covers.
It identifies the #Degree of abundance with which the #Theme covers or fills the #Location.
The time during which the #Theme and the #Location are positioned relative to each other.

The #Theme in this frame is the object which is described as standing in some spatial relation to a particular #Location. #Theme typically occurs as the External Argument or, with passives, as a PP Complement headed by with or by.
It is the entity or area with respect to which the #Theme s spatial arrangement is described.  This frame element generally occurs as an NP Object.
The part of the #Location which contains or is covered by the #Theme.
The time at which the #Theme occupies the #Location.

An indication of how the locative phrase relates to the grounding of the speech situation, either locating it near (here) or far (there, yonder). Fillers of this FE are restricted to this closed class of items.
A description of how much of a potential profiled region actually has (or is expected to have) a #Theme in it. It is normally filled by closed-class items like  all, somewhere, nowhere, etc.

A description of how the access path to the #Location interacts with time. This FE is filled only by the closed class adverbial back.adv (which indicates that the position was occupied by the #Theme before).  While this FE in its most basic use refers to cases of actual motion, it can background motion entirely (as in the example below).
It marks constituents that express the set of objects or types whose diversity is at issue.
It marks constituents which express a property in respect to which the similarity of the #Group is assessed.
The extent to which the members of the #Group are similar to each other, in general or with respect to some #Dimension.
It identifies the #Time when the #Group is diverse or homogenous.
The #Place is the general area in which diversity occurs or exists.
It identifies the #Manner in which #Dimension is similar or different.
An inanimate entity or process that causes the diversity or homogeneity.
It is used for any #Depictive phrase describing the state of the #Group.
The holder of the document.
The authority that issues the document.
It is the obligation that is imposed on the #Bearer of the #Document.
It is the right of the #Bearer of the #Document that is authorized by the #Document.
It is the state of the #Bearer of the #Document indicated by the #Document.
It is the condiontion that has to do with the #Right and #Obligation of the Document.
It is the piece of paper that has the legal status.
The language the #Document is written in, or a specification of the kind of object that instantiates it.
It covers any characterization or description of the target that is not covered by another more specific FE.
The #Dodger acts to avoid an oncoming #Bad_entity.
The #Bad_entity is  the oncoming entity to avoid.
It identifies the #Degree to which the dodging occurs.
It identifies the #Manner in which the dodging occurs.
It identifies the #Place where the dodging occurs.
It identifies the #Time at which the dodging occurs.
It identifies the #Purpose for which the dodging occurs.
It identifies the  #Explanation for which the dodging occurs.
It identifies the #Means by which the dodging occurs.
It denotes the #Predicate which is applied to the #Domain.
It applies to the #Domain in which the #Predicate is said to apply.
It denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically follows.
The #Agent controls the #Patient by being forceful and possibly aggressive.
The #Patient is trying to gain control of a situation, but ends up being subject to the control and influence of the #Agent.
The #Situation within which the #Agent is able to gain control over the #Patient (thus excluding them from controlling the #Situation).
The period of time over which the domination occurs.
A description of the event as a whole, or of any of the participants that does not fit any of the other more specific Frame Elements.
The place where the domination occurs.
The time when the domination takes place.
The #Degree to which the #Agent dominates the #Patient.
The #Agent is the most forceful and pivotal factor in the situation.
The #Situation is primarily affected by the #Agent, in particular how it develops or concludes.
The #Time when the #Agent is dominant.
The period of time over which the domination occurs.
The location where the domination takes place.
A description of the event as a whole, or of any of the participants that does not fit any of the other more specific Frame Elements.
The #Degree to which the #Agent dominates the #Situation.
The #Agent has a controlling position in the #Situation.
The #Situation is primarily affected by the #Agent, in particular how it develops or concludes.
The #Competitors are trying to gain control of a situation, but end up being subject to the control and influence of the #Agent.
The time when the domination takes place.
The location of the domination.
The manner of the domination.
The length of time over which the domination takes place.
The #Degree to which the #Agent dominates.
The paste made out of any cereals (grains) or leguminous crops by grinding, with some water added, which expands in volume as a result of leavening before baking.
The length of the interval during which the #Dough rises.
The #Time when the expansion of the #Dough takes place.
The #Speed at which the #Dough expands.

Any description of the rising of the #Dough  which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).
A setting, often temporal or spatial, within which the event takes place. This FE also covers conditions that are causally connected to the event of the #Dough rising.
The amount by which the volume of the #Dough increases.
The entity or state of affairs that leads to the event of the #Dough's rising.
The #Agent forces the #Patient to come to the ground.
The #Patient is the entity that is being forced to the ground.
Depictive phrase describing the actor of an action.
The #Result of causing the #Patient to come to the ground.
An act performed by an #Agent that enables them to force the #Patient to the ground.

Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).
The time at which the event takes place.
The location at which the event takes place.
An event which causes the #Patient to come to the ground.
An object used by the #Agent to facilitate bringing down the #Patient.
The individual that puts #Clothing on their body.
It is used for the item of clothing that the #Wearer ends up wearing.
The body part that the #Clothing ends up covering.

Any expression which describes a property of the donning event which is not directly related to the trajectory of the #Clothing's motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of speed, steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.
It identifies any #Depictive phrase describing the #Wearer or #Clothing during the act.
The #Means is an act whereby the #Wearer puts on the #Clothing.
It identifies the #Result of the Placing.
It identifies the #Duration of the Wearing that results from putting on the #Clothing.
The #Place indicates where the Donning occurs.
The #Explanation indicates why the #Wearer puts on the #Clothing.
The time when the #Wearer puts an item of #Clothing on.
An action that the #Wearer intends to accomplish by putting on #Clothing.
The #Visitor arrives at the Host_location to visit the #Host for a #Purpose.

#Normal_location is any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion. While #Normal_location expressions are possible in this frame, they are relatively infrequent.  If present, they often express a general direction from which a #Visitor moves, rather than a landmark away from which it moves.
#Path is any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Normal_location nor the #Host or Host_location.  In this frame, #Path expressions almost always have a via-sense.

The #Host is the person highly associated with the goal location of the #Visitor, and who allows the #Visitor onto his/her territory, and possibly to make use of available resources. The #Host and #Visitor and in a host-guest relationship.

A #Manner expression  describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion.  Descriptions of speed, steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.
It identifies the #Means by which an #Visitor arrives.

The #Mode_of_transportation expresses how the motion of the #Visitor is effected, by its body or by a vehicle which holds and conveys the #Visitor.   Vehicles can move in any way and in any medium. They are usually expressed obliquely with  in  or  by .
It identifies the #Time when arriving occurs.
It identifies the purpose for which the #Visitor arrives at a location associated with the #Host.
The #Host_location is a place primarily associated with the #Host.
It denotes an event or state of affairs that occurs or holds at a time that includes the time during which the visiting takes place.
The frequency with which the #Visitor drops in on a #Host.
The length of time that the #Visitor remains with the #Host.
The larger area within which the visiting takes place.
It indicates that the visiting is a particular instance in a series of repeated visiting events.
A state of affairs that explains why the #Visitor is making a visit.
The #Agent places the #Theme into a #Substance.
The #Theme temporarily goes partially or completely into the #Substance.
The #Substance is the fluid into which the #Theme is placed. This may be metonymically represented by the container of the fluid.
The way that the #Agent puts #Theme in the #Substance.
The location in time when the dunking occurs.
The #Creator produces the #Copy based on the #Original.
The #Original is the entity which is copied.
The #Copy produced by the #Creator is frequently not expressed.

The #Source is the location from which material is copied, i.e. the location of the #Original. Unlike the FE #Source in other domains and frames, there is no actual movement of either #Copy or #Original from this location.
The #Goal is the location to which material is copied. Unlike the FE #Goal in other frames, there is no actual movement of any entity to this location.
It designates the character of the medium in which a #Copy is made.
An intentional action performed by the #Creator that lets them bring about the duplication.
The #Manner of performing an action.
The #Result of an event.
It identifies any #Depictive phrase that describes a primary participant, either the #Creator, the #Copy or the #Original.
The #Degree to which event occurs.
The #Purpose for which an intentional act is performed.
When the event occurs.
Where the event takes place.
The #Explanation for which an intentional act is performed.
The #Instrument with which an intentional act is performed.
The amount of time for which a state holds or a process is ongoing.
The way in which the #Copy matches or does not match the #Original.
The #Iterations is the number of times the #Original is copied.
It is the #Frequency with which the #Original is copied.
An entity that participates in much the same way as another participant (#Creator, #Copy, or #Original), although it is characterized as being less focal to the action.

A situation, action or event whose duration is being described.  The Eventuality occurs as the External Argument if the adjective is used predicatively, or as the modified noun if the adjective is used attributively.
Sometimes these adjectives describe simply a period of time, rather than an event or state.  The Period almost invariably occurs as the modified noun with an attributive adjective.
The #Degree to which event occurs.
A situation, action or event whose duration is being described.
Sometimes a period of time, rather than an event or state is described.
The amount of time that the #Eventuality, #Period, or #Entity lasts.

An item which is metonymically related to an #Eventuality. Some common eventualities that are metonymically entailed are the effect of the entity in its capacity as an instrument and the existence of the entity.
An individual that deploys a resource to receive a benefit.
The #Period whose the duration #Attribute is appropriate and under consideration.
The feature of an #Period which is under discussion, namely the duration.
A quantity or other characterization of the #Period's absolute duration.
A modifier expressing  the deviation of the #Duration from the norm.
A standard measure, having a known duration.
The number of #Units which are equivalent to the #Duration of the #Period .
A process whose duration is measured.
It is the being or entity that dies.
The location where the dying event happens.
The #Explanation why the dying event occurs.
When the dying event occurs.
How long the #Protagonist is dying.

Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), force (hard, softly), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).
How often the dying event occurs.
When the event occurs.
Concrete or abstract entity

The #Explanation denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically follows. This often means that the #Explanation causes the target's proposition, but not in all cases.

The #Endeavor is rendered unable to continue its regular operations.

<ex><fex name="end">His small business</fex> <t>failed</t>.</ex>

The #Explanation is named as one of the causes of failure.

<ex><fex name="end">The local McDonalds</fex> <t>shut down</t> in 2008 <fex name="exp">because the owner died</fex>.</ex>

The #Time of the failure.

<ex><fex name="end">Her campaign</fex> <t>failed</t> <fex name="tim">in 2008</fex> but found much more support in 2012.</ex>

The #Place of the failing #Endeavor.

<ex><fex name="end">The hot dog stand</fex> <fex name="pla">on 4th avenue</fex> <t>flopped</t>.</ex>

The #Circumstances that caused failure. Compared to #Explanation, this describes situations or environments that lead to failure, not a specific reason for failure.

<ex><fex name="end">Shops</fex> often <t>close down</t> <fex name="cir">amid political or economic chaos</fex>.</ex>

The #Manner describes the way in which the #Endeavor failed.

<ex><fex name="exp">Because of its lack of funding</fex>, <fex name="end">the website</fex> <fex name="man">quickly</fex> <t>flopped</t>.</ex>

The #Containing_event is an event within which the failure occurs.

<ex><fex name="end">Businesses</fex> <fex name="pla">in the Congo</fex> <t>failed</t> <fex name="Containing_event">during the civil war</fex>.</ex>

A #Depictive describes something about the #Endeavor.

<ex><fex name="end">The business</fex>, <fex name="dep">unable to maintain appeal in the E.U.</fex>, <t>closed its doors</t> <fex name="tim">in 2003</fex>.</ex>
The degree to which the #Endeavor fails.
The means by which the #Endeavor fails.

The #Rule is the set of constrants on behavior that the #Agent implements (i.e., forces others to obey or face consequences).

<ex>Employers should strictly <t>enforce</t> <fex name="Rule">a prohibition against use of any substance that may affect a worker s physical or mental ability</fex>.</ex>

The length of time for which the #Rule is or is not in effect.

<ex>The coat-and-tie dress code for the Plimsoll Club in the World Trade Center was strictly <t>enforced</t> <fex name="dur">for years</fex>.</ex>

The #Time at which the Agent enforces the #Rule.

<ex>That particular regulation was only <t>enforced</t> <fex name="tim">in 1920</fex>.</ex>

The #Place at which the #Rule is or is not enforced.

<ex>For this reason they <t>enforced</t> the settlement system <fex name="place">in America</fex> just as strictly as in Germany.</ex>
The state-of-affairs under which the Agent puts the #Rule into effect.

This FE describes an additional situation or modification that would seem to hold given the rest of the situation. In some cases, it marks a completely separate conclusion than one would draw from the manner of the event in the main clause.  As far as we know, this idea is only explicitly marked in English with "as if".

<ex>We have to <t>do</t> our duty <fex name="Apparent_conclusion">as if it matters</fex> .</ex>

Usually, the #Apparent_conclusion contains another FE, either peripheral or extra-thematic, which is non-factive (i.e., it may, but does not necessarily, hold). For these cases, we annotate the other frame-element on the second layer; thus the following should be annotated with #Purpose on the second layer. 

<ex><fex name="Apparent_conclusion">As if to guarantee failure</fex> , they <t>conducted</t> the study without consulting experts .</ex>
<ex>As if <fex name="Purpose">to guarantee failure</fex> , they <t>conducted</t> the study without consulting experts .</ex>

We do not annotate this FE in cases where we merely infer that a part of the sentence is meant sarcastically, as in the following minimal modification of the above sentence:

<ex>To guarantee failure , they <t>conducted</t> the study without consulting experts .</ex>

In this case, we simply annotate the #Purpose FE.

The #Leader is the one who has the role of leading.  With verbs, and with predicate nominals linking an individual to a #Role, the #Leader is usually the External Argument: 
<ex><fex name="Leader">King Hussein</fex> <t>ruled</t> Jordan.</ex> 
<ex><fex name="Leader">Hussein</fex> was <t>King</t> of Jordan.</ex> 
With leadership nouns, the frame element #Leader is most frequently instantiated by the target itself.
<ex>The <fex name="Leader"><t>queen</t></fex> announced her upcoming visit to Belgium.</ex>

The role played by the #Leader in a given situation, often an official title; incorporated in most noun LUsin this frame. When expressed separately from the target, #Role usually occurs in a PP Complement headed by <ment>as</ment>.

<ex>Hussein <t>reigned</t> <fex name="Role">as King of Jordan</fex></ex>

Leadership by any particular individual is frequently limited in time, which is noted here as #Duration.   #Duration usually occurs in a PP Complement.
<ex>She <t>reigned</t> <fex name="Duration">for 3 years</fex>.</ex>

#Depictive refers to that which describes one of the participants in the leadership relationship.

<ex>He <t>led</t> them for a thousand years, <fex name="Dep">strong, bold, and deathless</fex>.</ex>

This FE is filled by one of a closed class of adverbs:  up, down, out (meaning  beyond the boundary around the viewpoint ), off (meaning  disconnect between landmark and figure ), back (meaning  along a line from front to back of landmark, and relatively inaccessible ), and, more rarely, away, along, and dialectally, back down (meaning  down and behind ).

<ex>She has a boyfriend way <fex name="Deixis">over</fex> <t>in</t> Springfield.</ex>

An indication of how accessible the #Figure is to some participant in the speech context (either the speaker or the addressee, or some other highly salient viewpoint in a narrative).  This FE normally describes availability for manipulation and use, but may simply describe how easily seen or difficult to see the #Figure is. There is a closed class of items that can fill this slot, including only  just  and  right  indicating ease of access, and  way ,  all the way , or (dialectally)  clear  indicating distance and difficulty of access.  

<ex>Oh yeah , the flashlight  s <fex name="Accessibility">right</fex> <t>in</t> my handbag.</ex>
<ex> I had an uncle that lived <fex name="Accessibility">clear</fex> over <t>in</t> Kenmore , and I tried to ride my bike there.</ex>

#Party_1 is generally encoded as the External Argument of verbs, and
peripheral FEs that do not make reference to the event itself
generally make reference to #Party_1. Thus #Manner is construed to be that of #Party_1, not necessarily that of #Party_2 or the group of #Parties as a whole.

This is the person (or people) to whom a mental property is attributed. The FE may be expressed as External Argument of a predicative use of the adjective, as a PP Complement, or as the head noun modified by an attributive use of the adjective: 
<ex><fex name="Protagonist">You</fex> were <t>smart</t> to save all your receipts.</ex>
<ex>It was <t>smart</t> <fex name="Protagonist">of you</fex> to save all your receipts.</ex>
<ex>You are a <t>smart</t> <fex name="Protagonist">person</fex> to save your receipts.</ex>

The #Behavior refers to any action, utterance, belief, or artifact thereof on the basis of which a mental property is attributed to the #Protagonist. The meaning of the English word <ment>behavior</ment> should not be taken to constrain the identity of this frame element too much---conceptually, this frame element includes things that would not normally be described using the word <ment>behavior</ment>.  Note the following examples:
<ex>That was a <t>stupid</t> <fex name="Behavior">mistake</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The manager made a few <t>stupid</t> <fex name="Behavior">remarks</fex> and then sat down.</ex>
<ex>What a <t>stupid</t> <fex name="Behavior">book</fex>!</ex>
<ex>It s <t>stupid</t> <fex name="Behavior">to think that everything will improve</fex>.</ex>

Some of the words in this frame have a slightly different use in that they evaluate someone only with respect to their mental performance in some particular domain or capacity.  We call this domain or capacity <t>Practice</t>. E.g., She is <t>astute</t> <fex name="Practice">at math</fex>. Note that this does not mean she is considered to be astute in general for doing math. Rather, she is astute with respect to math, but may be dumb with respect to other things. These uses probably belong in a different frame with words such as <ment>skilled</ment>, but for the time being they are marked with the FE Practice. General Grammatical Observations:  The adjectives in this frame may exhibit Extraposition of a <ment>to</ment>-marked infinitive VP, with an optional Protagonist expressed in an <ment>of</ment>-PP: It was <t>brilliant</t> (of you) <fex name="Prac">to invite the clowns to the party</fex>.

#Degree marks the extent to which the #Behavior or #Practice is exhibited or attributed.

<ex>Jenkins is <fex name="Manr">far too</fex> <t>astute</t> to fall for that</ex>
<ex>She was <fex name="Degr">a bit</fex> <t>careless</t> at adding drops.</ex>

#Manner refers to the method or way in which the Mental_property is attributed to the #Protagonist.

<ex>It was not licence he wanted -- his goal was the <fex name="Manr">forcible</fex> <t>enlightenment</t> of mankind.</ex>

The domain in which the #Behavior or #Protagonist has a given mental property.
<ex>It was <fex name="Domain">politically</fex> <t>astute</t> to decline the offer.</ex>

The individual whose point of view is taken in assigning the judgment denoted by the target.

<ex><fex name="jud">To my mind</fex>, his dialogues with his Vietnamese counterpart were the most trenchant, <t>astute</t> and screamingly funny things Trudeau has ever done</ex>
