The act that the #Recipient performs which brings about their reception of the #Theme.

<ex>She received the package <fex name="mea">by signing her name on the delivery certification</fex>.</ex>

The system whereby the #Theme travels (literally or metaphorically) so that the #Recipient comes into possession of the #Theme.

<ex>I <t>received</t> it <fex name="mod">by e-mail</fex>.</ex>
The participant in a reciprocal event that is encoded as the subject of an active-form sentence or as a by-PP in a passive.
The participant in a reciprocal event that is coded in a with-PP.
The jointly expressed participants in a reciprocal activity.

The #Agent is the sentient entity that creates a permanent record of the #Phenomenon.

<ex>Police informed Mr Wong that <fex name="age">they</fex> <t>recorded</t> the attack as a racial incident.</ex>

The #Phenomenon is the entity or situation in the world of which a #Agent becomes aware. 

<ex>Adams took some very good advice and meticulously <t>recorded</t> <fex name="Phen">the events that ensued</fex>.</ex>

Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may also indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent  that also affect the action (<ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>, <ment>carefully</ment>).
This FE identifes the action whereby the #Agent creates a record of the #Phenomenon.
This FE identifies the #Time when the #Agent creates the record of the #Phenomenon.
The goal that the #Agent has in mind in creating a record of the #Phenomenon.
The #Agent uses an #Instrument in order to create a record of the #Phenomenon or to measure an #Entity s #Value for a specified #Attribute.

That feature of the #Entity which is under discussion.


<ex>When Mohammed was sentenced to death in the Anti-Terrorism Court in Rawalpindi
the court <t>recorded</t> <fex name="Attribute">his age</fex> as  17 or 18.</ex>

The value of the #Entity that is recorded for the specified #Attribute.

<ex>In the fiscal year 2000, Nepal s imports from China and Tibet were <t>recorded</t> <fex name="Value">at
166.6 million dollars</fex>.</ex>

An entity for which the #Agent records the #Value of an #Attribute.

<ex>At the time the Army <t>recorded</t> <fex name="ent">him</fex> as a married resident of the Town of Two Creeks.</ex>

#Medium is the physical entity in which the #Agent creates a record of their impression of the #Phenomenon.

<ex>In fact, Pepys <t>recorded</t> everything <fex name="med">in his diary</fex>.</ex>

The symbolic system used by the #Agent.

<ex> I <t>recorded</t> my notes <fex name="med">in English</fex>, usually translating from French.</ex>

The location where the #Agent sets down the facts.

<ex>From what the book says, these events were <t>recorded</t> <fex name="pla">in the Chamber of Mazarbul</fex> .</ex>
The extent to which the #Phenomenon has been documented.
The amount of times the #Agent records something per unit of time.

Duration denotes the length of time from the beginning of a continuous situation (the one denoted by the target) to its end. In many cases, the continuous situation is a dynamic action which is ongoing, while in others it is simply an undifferentiated state.
This FE denotes a duration in which the recording event occurred iteratively.

The <fex name="Record">Record</fex> is the entity in which events or accounts are permanently recorded.
<ex>She kept a <t><fex name="Record">record</fex></t> of how many times he asked to borrow money.</ex>

The #Data is the information which is recorded in the #Record.  It is often expressed as a prepositional phrase.
<ex>Andy kept a <t>log</t> <fex name="Data">of the girls he had dated</fex>.</ex>
<ex>His assistant maintained the <t>records</t> <fex name="Data">of customer payments</fex>.</ex>

The #Recorder is the person who records the #Data in the #Record.
<ex><fex name="Recorder">Shirley s</fex> <t>log</t> of her favorite eateries grew every day.</ex>

The #Entity is the person or institution for which the #Record is maintained.
<ex>She keeps the <t>books</t> <fex name="Entity">for the advertising firm</fex>.</ex>
<ex><fex name="Entity">The bank s</fex> <t>records</t> were not ready for the unexpected audit.</ex>

The #Type refers to the kind of #Record being kept.
<ex>Molly was in charge of the <fex name="Type">finacial</fex> <t>records</t> at the small law firm.</ex>

A characteristic of the #Record.

<ex>Moria s bank kept <fex name="Descriptor">detailed</fex> <t>books</t>.</ex>
What a #Record is made of (if applicable).
The Medium is the language in which a Record is composed, or the physical medium (radio, ink) in which it is distributed.
The region where the #Record is sold, circulated, or otherwise popular
The Time at which the #Record was created.
The Title of a #Record.
Topic is what the #Record is about.
The use for which the #Record was produced; its purpose.

The    Patient may either be expressed as the External Argument or, as in Health.Cure, may occur as the possessor of the Affliction (an example of FE conflation): 
<ex><fex name="Patient">Pat</fex> is <t>convalescing</t> from surgery.</ex>
<ex>Pat s wound is <t>healing</t>.</ex>
In the second example, <ment>Pat s wound</ment> is the #Body_part, but <ment>Pat s</ment> is also an instantiation of the #Patient.

This FE is the injury, pain or disease experienced by the Patient.  Affliction occurs either as an External Argument of verbs or as a PP Complement of nouns or verbs: 
<ex><fex name="Affliction">The wound</fex> is <t>healing</t> well.</ex>
<ex><fex name="Affliction">Pat s wound</fex> is <t>healing</t> well.</ex>
<ex>Pat is <t>recovering</t> <fex name="Affliction">from scarlet fever</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Pat s <t>recovery</t> <fex name="Affliction">from scarlet fever</fex> was very rapid. </ex>

Where Body Part is expressed as a separate constituent (rather than in phrases such as <ment>the wound on Pat s arm</ment>), it occurs as an External Argument: 
<ex><fex name="Body_part">Pat s arm</fex> <t>healed</t> up quickly.</ex>
 Body Part is treated as a separate Frame Element although it may be viewed as metonymic for Affliction.
Manner of performing an action
The extent to which the #Patient s state diverges from their former illness.

An act of the #Patient that results in their recovery.
<ex>You will <t>recover</t> more quickly <fex name="Mns">by getting simple bed-rest</fex>.</ex>

An individual or group of individuals that the #Patient is generally in the presence of during convalescence.

<ex>She had confidently expected to <t>convalesce</t> <fex name="Company">with her brother and his wife</fex>.</ex>
The time at which the recovery takes place.
The location where the recovery takes place.
The entity that is in motion, and changes path due to the action of an Agent or due to a Cause.

The route that the #Theme was originally headed for.  In cases when the #Theme is an intentional actor or is controlled by an intentional actor, the #Original_path correlates with the (former) plan of the actor.  In other cases, the #Original_path corresponds to what would be expected for the path of the #Theme from general principles or physics.  (In some cases, the #Original_path may indicate the intended destination, and not just the path, of the #Theme.)

<ex>VTA <t>detoured</t> motorists <fex name="ori">from southbound I-880</fex> onto Airport Boulevard to access Coleman Avenue.</ex>

The #Path refers to (a part of) the ground over which the #Theme ends up travelling after being diverted.


<ex>Traffic was <t>redirected</t> Tuesday <fex name="Path">along Melrose Avenue</fex> to make way for the scoreboard columns, Mellecker said.</ex>

The location the #Theme ends up in after being redirected.


<ex>Not knowing any better, he <t>redirected</t> people <fex name="Goal">to the city center</fex>.</ex>

This FE identifies the #Time when the redirection of motion occurs.

<ex><fex name="Time">Last Tuesday</fex> they were <t>detouring</t> everybody down onto 5th avenue .</ex>

Any description of the redirection which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of the #Agent that affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>). 

<ex>Anything flagged as suspect by this system would be <fex name="Manr">carefully</fex> <t>diverted</t> to another nearby area, remote from public access. and well shielded, for a second screening .</ex>

The state of the Theme or Agent during the redirection.

<ex>The emergency personnel <t>redirected</t> the cars back towards the border, <fex name="Dep">unaware of the recent conflagration</fex>.</ex>

The #Place is the location at which the redirection occurs.

<ex>They <t>redirected</t> us <fex name="">at the corner of Alstone and Bokchoy Avenue</fex>.</ex>

This FE is used for expressions that indicate motion along a line from the current deitic center towards a reference point (which may be implicit) that does not necessarily correspond to the #Goal.  Often #Direction is defined with reference to the canonical orientation of the #Theme, the orientation imposed by an implicit observer, or the inherent orientation of the scene.

<ex>Flight 93 left Newark, NJ, earlier that day, bound for San Francisco, but it was hijacked by four terrorists who <t>diverted</t> it <fex name="dir">back toward Washington, DC</fex> . </ex>

The state-of-affairs that the Agent intends to bring about by redirecting the #Theme.

<ex>She was talking about how the passengers <t>diverted</t> the plane in order <fex name="pur">to protect
the nation s capital</fex>.</ex>

An individual that determines the change in course of the #Theme.

<ex>When we ended up over in Marrakech, or Dakar, <fex name="age">they</fex> <t>diverted</t> us up to Tobruk.</ex>

An event that brings about the change in the #Path of the #Theme.

<ex>We even got a bonus morning in Tokyo s international airport when <fex name="Cause">a bad storm</fex>
<t>diverted</t> us on the way to Asia.</ex>
The method by which the #Agent redirects the #Theme.
Role of each member of the refereeing at the soccer game.
Specification of the function performed by a member of the refereeing.
Characteristics of the referee.
The place from where the person is.
The person in charge of ensuring that the rules of the game will be followed.
The referee may take several actions during the match, such as controlling its duration, awarding goals, conceding compensations and applying sanctions to the players.

The #Source_of_information is referred to as a source of information related to the current text.

<ex>The accreting matter forms a disc whose instabilities trigger outbursts (<t>see</t> <fex name="soi">Lasota 2001</fex> for a review of the instability model).</ex>

The #Source_of_information contains #Information that the reader is directed to.

<ex>The accreting matter forms a disc whose instabilities trigger outbursts (<t>see</t> Lasota 2001 <fex name="inf">for a review of the instability model</fex>). </ex>
The person who uses the #Name to refer to the #Entity.
The entity that is designated by the #Speaker with the #Name used.
The linguistic form used by the #Speaker to refer to the #Entity.
The point of time or interval when the #Speaker uses the #Name.
It describes the #Name.
The sentient entity that effects a change in the #Entity.

The time at which the change of the #Entity is caused.

<ex>The House of Representatives, on a bipartisan basis, sought to <t>reform</t> the program <fex name="Time">this year</fex>.</ex>

The extent to which the #Entity differs from its former state at the end of the reform.

<ex>I am trying to <fex name="deg">completely</fex> <t>overhaul</t> my diet, and i need help.</ex>

Any description of the  event causing the change of the #Entity which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>), general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>), and salient characteristics of the #Agent that also affect the action (<ment>carefully</ment>).

The #Explanation denotes a proposition from which reform event logically follows. In many cases, the state of affairs denoted is specifically one that the #Agent takes as a reason for reforming the entity.

<ex>But his great-grandson, Aurangzeb (1618-1707), <t>reformed</t>
the policy <fex name="exp">due to religious conflicts</fex>. </ex>

This FE denotes a complex, abstract, human-created entity with interdependent parts which has either deteriorated or is no longer adequate for its purpose given a change in circumstances and which the #Agent therefore wants to modify.

<ex>Particular attention will be devoted to recent proposals to <t>reform</t> <fex name="ent">UK competition policy</fex>.</ex>

An action that the #Agent intends to accomplish by effecting a change in the #Entity.

<ex>Indeed, as the world becomes increasingly paperless, it would be prudent to consider <t>overhauling</t> the rules <fex name="pur">in order to adapt them to a digitalized society</fex>.</ex>

The category of which the #Entity is a member before the #Agent causes a change in its makeup.

<ex>Since 1986, the Vietnamese Government has performed a  doi moi  (renovation)
policy that <t>reformed</t> the economy <fex name="ini">from central planning economy</fex> to market.</ex>

The category that the #Entity belongs to after it has undergone the change.

<ex>We have also <t>reformed</t> the office managing system from a "proprietorship" <fex name="Final_category">to a "partnership"</fex>.</ex>
This FE identifies the steps or actions directly enabling reform.
An alternative description of expressed action
This FE is used for phrases that describe the event of reforming as a whole .
This FE describes the state of the world (at a particular time and place) which is specifically independent of the reform process.
The length of time over which reforming takes place

This FE is for non-human causes, such as a processes or institutions, responsible for reform.  

<ex>Thus , <fex name="Cause">radical reform</fex> <t>restructures</t> rape offences in ways that it is hoped will facilitate the prosecution process without jeopardising the interests of the accused .</ex>
The place where the reformation occurs.

The #Cognizer is the one that makes a #Judgment. This role is typically expressed as the External Argument (or in a <ment>by</ment>-PP in passives).

<ex><fex name="Cognizer">The boss</fex> <t>appreciates</t> you for your diligence.</ex>
<ex><fex name="Cognizer">The boss</fex> is very <t>appreciative</t> of my work.</ex>

#Evaluee is the person or thing that a judgment is made with respect to. With verbs this FE is typically expressed as Object: 
<ex>He <t>regarded</t> <fex name="eva">her</fex> poorly.</ex>

There may be a constituent expressing the #Explanation for the #Cognizer s judgment. It is usually a <ment>for</ment>-PP.

<ex>I <t>think</t> highly of you <fex name="exp">for your honesty</fex>.</ex>

#Role is used for the capacity in which the #Evaluee is judged, and is expressed in <ment>as</ment>-PPs.  <ex>My high <t>regard</t> for you <fex name="rol">as a composer</fex> is due strictly to political concerns. </ex>

#Depictive identifies any expression describing the state of a participant in the event.

<ex>We hold him in low <t>esteem</t>, <fex name="dep">certain that he will never redeem himself</fex>.</ex>
Any description of the #Cognizer s judgment which is not covered by more specific FEs, including general descriptions of events (<ment>the same way, presumptuously, secretly</ment>).
The #Extent_of_acclaim is a description of the number or locales of the #Cognizers.  <ex>He is <fex name="ext">widely</fex> held in high <t>regard</t>.</ex>

A description (from the point of view of the #Cognizer) of the position of the #Evaluee on a scale of approval.

<ex>I hold him in the <fex name="jud">highest</fex> <t>esteem</t>.</ex>
A region of space located inside a #Ground.
An entity whose location is relatively well-known and which, thus, can serve as a land-mark to identify the #Interior, #Surface, or #Boundary.
The region located outside of, but in contact with, the #Ground.
The region associated with the boundary of the #Ground.
The region which is not located inside or in contact with the #Ground.
The #Agent (most commonly a group of people) is responsible for an attempted rejection of leadership.

With words denoting removal (or attempted removal) from office of a leader, the #Old_leader is typically the direct object of verbs, or occurs in a PP Complement with noun targets, frequently headed by the preposition against.
With words denoting appointment to a position, the #New_leader is typically the object of verbs.
Frequently the #Old_leader or #New_leader is referred to only by his/her role. However, the #Role can be expressed separately from the leader.
It identifies the political order that existed before the change of leadership occurs.
It indicates the #Degree to which an event occurs.
It indicates the state of one of the participants during the action.
It is used for the #Manner of performing an action.
It identifies the #Means by which the #Agent attempts to accomplish the change of leadership.
It is used for indicating the #Result of an event.
It describes the situation that brought about the attempted change of leadership.
The #Function is the purpose the #New_leader will fulfill.
When the change takes place.
Where the change takes place.
A group of individuals who are elected or appointed to perform some function of governance.
The situation that the #Agent attempts to bring about by the change of leadership.

The concrete or abstract thing that is brought into an earlier state in which it was more effective and powerful.

<ex>The <t>reinvigoration</t> <fex name="ent">of the tourism</fex> economy is recognised by many as an ambitious but necessary objective.</ex>

The #Agent puts the #Entity into a state of renewed vigor.

<ex><fex name="Agt">We</fex> <t>revitalized</t> the Golden Mountaineer Card, and we gave seniors a prescription drug benefit.</ex>

This FE identifies the place where the Agent brings about the change in the #Entity s state.


<ex>New York s distinction as America s tax cut leader has <t>revitalized</t> the economy
<fex name="Place">in every corner of the state</fex>.</ex>

This FE identifies the purpose for which an #Agent brings about the revitalization of the #Entity.

<ex>Older neighborhoods throughout the area should be <t>revitalized</t> <fex name="Purp">in order to be retained as neighborhoods having unique identities</fex>.</ex>

This FE identifies the time when the #Agent causes the renewal of the #Entity.

<ex>Production was <t>revitalized</t> <fex name="Time">last June</fex>.</ex>

This FE identifies the action that the #Agent performs in order so as to bring about the reinvigoration of the #Entity.

<ex>Natalie Cole <t>resuscitated</t> her career <fex name="Means">by recording a posthumous duet with her father on his old hit "Unforgettable"</fex>.</ex>

Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Agent that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>). 

<ex>They assessed the effectiveness of four different species of native trees for <fex name="Mnr">rapid</fex> <t>rejuvenation</t> of the mined land.</ex>

The #Domain within which the #Entity is affected.

<ex>Course wares and websites should be changed and <t>renewed</t> <fex name="dom">creatively</fex> often.</ex>

The number of times that an #Entity is caused to return to a more effective state.

<ex>Ancient Egypt twice fell into a similar state of decrepitude, and was <fex name="ite">twice</fex> <t>rejuvenated</t> and suffused with energy and artistic creativeness.</ex>

An event or state whose occurrence brings about the #Entity s return to a vigorous state.

<ex>Rock has been <t>rejuvenated</t> creatively and commercially <fex name="cau">by hip-hop-inspired rock acts</fex>.</ex>

This FE is used for phrases that describe the clause of the target as a whole, either appraisals of the event, or descriptions of the rejuvenation event as role fillers in other frames. 

<ex>Blair s career was <fex name="eve">miraculously</fex> <t>revitalized</t>, personal liberties were compromised, and the global neocon war-agenda moved forward.</ex>
This frame element is defined as the number of times an event occurs per some unit of time. A Frequency expression answers the question how often.
This frame element selects some gradable attribute and modifies the expected value for it.
The device used by the #Agent to help accomplish the action indicated by the target.
#Role is used for the capacity in which the #Entity is Rejuvinated, and is expressed in <ment>as</ment>-PPs.
The end state of the Rejuvination action.

The concept which is linked to #Concept_2.

The concept which is tied to #Concept_1.

The point of view from which the connection exists.

The phenomenon that points to or proves the connection between #Concept_1 and #Concept_2. Generally expressed as an external.

The #Circumstances under which the connection exists.

The two concepts expressed jointly.

The #Degree of connection between the #Concepts.

A further specification on the linkage.

An entity with a relationship to #Entity_2.
The entity with a relationship to #Entity_1.

A characterization of the relation that determines what model is active for further reasoning.
The region which is located relative to the Ground and which is shaped according to an image schema.
Salient parts that make up a #Profiled_region.
A place that a #Profiled_region is located with respect to.
Indicates the action (or causer) which brings the features of the #Profiled_region about.  This FE should also include words that indicate that there was no salient formation.
The location that the #Profiled_region is a part of.

An event related to the #Profiled_region in some way other than (1) Formational_cause (which is a separate FE) or an intended use (which would place the instance in Locale_by_use), or (3) a defining event (which would place the instance in Locale_by_event).
The activity that is carried out in the #Profiled_region.
An entity whose location is relatively well-known and which, thus, can serve as a land-mark to identify the #Profiled_region.
The number which represents the relative quantities of the #Numerator and the #Denominator.
Identifies the quantity whose magnitude is determined relative to the #Denominator.
The set of things to which the #Rate pertains.
Any characteristic of the #Rate that is not covered by another more specific FE.
A name of the #Rate of or description of the particular category the #Rate belongs to.
The quantity whose magnitude is determined relative to the #Numerator.
The individual being described in terms of #Individual_2.
The individual whose identity serves to identify #Individual_2.
The type of connection between the #Individuals.
The individuals in a (symmetrically construed) #Relation to each other.
The #Focal_occasion is the event which is  being located in time with respect to some other event: The #Focal_occasion is profiled, in contrast to the #Landmark_occasion, which is backgrounded.
The #Landmark_occasion is the event  with respect to which the #Focal_occasion is located.
Frequently, it is the Interval between the #Landmark_occasion and the #Focal_occasion.
The #Degree to which event occurs.
The #Manner of performing an action.
It is used for the #Explanation for the #Focal_occasion being early or late.
The #Focal_participant is the participant in the #Focal_occasion which is profiled as being in a relation of relative time to the #Landmark_occasion.

The #Captor is the individual who ends the confinement or captivity of the #Theme. The release of the #Theme is in accord with the plans of the #Captor.

<ex><fex name="cap">The police</fex> <t>released</t> the suspect.</ex>

The #Theme is the person or object in motion released by the #Captor.

<ex>The police <t>released</t> <fex name="Theme">the suspect</fex>.</ex>

Any description of the release which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Captor that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>). 

<ex>The police <t>released</t> the suspect <fex name="Manner">carefully</fex>.</ex>

The action of the #Captor which brings about the release.

<ex>He <t>released</t> a hundred prisoners <fex name="Means">by signing a single document.</fex>.</ex>

The #Explanation identifies the reason for which the #Captor are releasing the #Theme.

<ex>The police <t>released</t> the suspect <fex name="Explanation"> because he had a good alibi</fex>.</ex>
The #Purpose identifies the purpose for which the #Captor release the #Theme.

The location where the #Theme ceases to be confined.

<ex>"Aren t you going to <t>release</t> us <fex name="Place">here</fex>?" she asked.</ex>
The #Time identifies when the #Captor release the #Theme .

The location to which the #Theme s motion was formerly inhibited.

<ex>She petitioned unsuccessfully for their <t>release</t> <fex name="Loc">from Chateau D If</fex>.</ex>

This FE signifies that the state of affairs expressed by the main clause (containing the target) occurs or holds, and something other than that state of affairs would be expected given the state of affairs in the concessive clause.
The state of the world when the Releasing event occurs.

The #Authorities are those who have the official authority to release a #Suspect.

<ex><fex name="Auth">The police</fex> <t>released</t> the suspect.</ex>

The #Suspect is the person released by the #Authorities, having been held under suspicion of having committed a crime.

<ex>The police <t>released</t> <fex name="Susp">the suspect</fex>.</ex>

The #Manner is the way in which the #Authorities release the #Suspect.

<ex>The police <t>released</t> the suspect <fex name="Manner">carefully</fex>.</ex>
The #Means identifies the means by which the #Authorities release the #Suspect.

The #Explanation identifies the reason for which the #Authorities are releasing the #Suspect.

<ex>The police <t>released</t> the suspect <fex name="Explanation"> because he had a good alibi</fex>.</ex>
The #Purpose identifies the purpose for which the #Authorities release the #Suspect.
The #Place identifies the place where the #Authorities release the #Suspect .
The #Time identifies when the #Authorities release the #Suspect .
The place that the #Suspect is no longer confined to.

The person or thing whose needs are served by the #Means action.

<ex> <fex name="Protagonist">I</fex> <t>rely</t> on this walking stick to get me around</ex>

An action or state that the #Means action brings about and from which the #Protagonist profits.

<ex>He still <t>relies</t> on me <fex name="Benefit">to do the head work</fex></ex>

The extent to which the achievement of the #Benefit depends on the #Means action.

<ex> He knows I <t>rely</t> <fex name="Degree">entirely</fex> on him to point out all my blunders and spelling mistakes.</ex>

The person or thing that performs a #Means action to the #Benefit of the #Protagonist.

<ex>We <t>rely</t>  <fex name="Intermediary">on you</fex> for feedback and input</ex>

An object that the #Protagonist uses to realize a #Benefit.

<ex>I hate having to <t>rely</t> <fex name="Instrument">on my car</fex> to get where I want to go</ex>

An action or state that the #Protagonist wants to bring about.  It is more or less the #Benefit viewed in relation to the #Protagonist rather than the #Means.

<ex>The user will quickly begin to <t>rely</t> on the pills <fex name="Purpose">to cope with life pressures</fex>.</ex>

An action performed either by the #Protagonist or an #Intermediary that has a #Benefit for  the #Protagonist attached to it.


<ex>We <t>rely</t> <fex name="Means">on your response</fex></ex>

The conditions when the #Protagonist needs to rely on an #Instrument or #Intermediary.

<ex>We have to fully rely on him <fex name="Circumstances">when times get a little rough</fex></ex>
An individual that considers the Expectation certain.

The fact which the #Cognizer depends on in planning for the future.

<ex>I think you should <t>count</t> <fex name="Expectation">on getting a paycut</fex>.</ex>

The situation in which the #Cognizer can count on the #Expectation.

<ex><fex name="Circum">When investing in such a volatile area</fex>, you can <t>bank</t> on getting burned a few times.</ex>
The #Believer is the person whose religious beliefs are in question.
The #Content is the object of the #Believer's religious conviction.
It identifies the #Degree to which the #Believer is convinced of the usefulness and validity of their religious beliefs.
It identifies the #Manner in which the #Believer knows or thinks something.
It is a  function that an #Element of the faith is believed to serve.
A predefined, fixed idea to which reference is made throughout the belief system.
The part of the Resource that the Process has not yet applied to.
The original set of items to which the Depletive_process applies one after the other.

The place where the Resource is found.

<ex>How much is <t>left</t> <fex name="loc">in the treasury</fex>?</ex>

The individual who owned the Resource that is being depleted.

<ex>Only two poems are <t>left</t> <fex name="oo">from Virgil Smithers</fex></ex>

The Time when the amount of the Resource that is let is assessed.

<ex><fex name="tm">In 1910</fex>, only two of the Renaissance buildings <t>remained</t></ex>

An individual who may use the #Remainder for his benefit.

<ex>Is there any food <t>left</t> <fex name="ben">for me</fex>?</ex>

A temporal setting or event which metonymically stands for the entities that were in existence then. The #Remainder is part of the #Original_context. This FE occurs especially when abstract entities such as social institutions are seen as #Resources.  <ex>Only the Beaux Arts cinema is <t>left</t> <fex name="oc">from the golden era of the 1940s</fex></ex>

A person who recalls memories of past experience or impressions.


<ex>I will truly miss Delmar and <fex name="cog">I</fex> will always <t>remember</t> when his eyes lit up everytime he got ice-cream.</ex>

A person or thing that the #Cognizer remembers as being involved in some state or event or as having some property.

<ex>today I saw a sister s exclassmate, and didn t recognise him, I <t>remember</t> <fex name="sal">him</fex> taller.</ex>

A past event or state that the #Cognizer witnessed and is now recalling. The #Experience may be a specific event or state or a vaguer period that is treated as a unit.

<ex> I can still <t>remember</t> <fex name="exp">saying the pledge every morning before class in elementary school</fex>, a rare occurrence among elementary school kids nowadays. </ex>

A property that the #Cognizer attributes to the #Salient_entity based on their past experience of the #Salient_entity or a category to which the #Salient_entity is assigned.

A property or role that a #Salient_entity actually held and which frames the memories that the #Cognizer has of the #Salient_entity.

<ex>Atulprasad is principally <t>remembered</t> <fex name="sta">as a musician and composer</fex>. </ex>

The degree of detail and/or immediacy of  a remembered #Experience.

<ex>Brian Wooley only <fex name="viv">dimly</fex> <t>remembered</t> the hand falling on his shoulder</ex>

A situation in which the Cognizer encountered the #Salient_entity.

<ex>She was just how I <t>remember</t> her <fex name="con">from school</fex> .</ex>

The time when the #Cognizer remembers the experience.

<ex>I  ll <fex name="tim">never</fex> <t>forget</t> being in hospital</ex>

Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously) and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of the #Cognizer that affect the action (fondly). 

<ex>Bill will be <fex name="man">fondly</fex> <t>remembered</t> by all.</ex>

The amount of time for which the #Cognizer remembers the experience.

<ex> Your generosity and kindness will be long <t>remembered</t> <fex name="dur">for years to come</fex>. </ex>

The person who retains and retrieves information.

<ex>I bet <fex name="cog">Johno</fex> can <t>remember</t> the name of the Ramones  drummer.</ex>

#Mental_content stored by and accessible to the #Cognizer. It may derive from experience or activity or simply from being informed of it.

<ex>Do you <t>remember</t> <fex name="men">how to spell cupboard ?</fex></ex>

The extent to which the remembered #Mental_content matches the information or experience that it is based on.

<ex>If I <t>remember</t> <fex name="acc">correctly</fex> the pre-War price for hanging a wall up, a roll of wallpaper was about sixpence a roll , and that included preparing as well.</ex>

The time when the #Cognizer retrieves #Mental_content or forgets it.

<ex> <fex name="tim">Afterwards</fex>, I <t>forgot</t> what I was pissed off about, but I was. </ex>

An entity, concrete or abstract, or an event that the remembered #Mental_content is about.


<ex>The boy who suffered brain damage when he was hit by a vehicle while walking into school testified Friday he <t>remembers</t> nothing <fex name="top">about being hit</fex>. </ex>

A situation or a text from which the #Mental_content was acquired.

<ex>You will <t>remember</t> <fex name="con">from grade school</fex> that you do not want to make the nuns impatient.</ex>

The person who thinks of or fails to think of an obligatory or desireable #Action.

<ex>.<fex name="cog">Alex and Zach Swindle</fex>, Centre, visited their brother in San Francisco in June and <t>remembered</t> to take along a copy of The Post>. </ex>

An #Action that the #Cognizer is supposed to carry out. This may be a Task imposed specifically on the #Cognizer or it may be self- or socially imposed.

<ex>This time we <t>remembered</t> <fex name="act">to turn the gas off before leaving</fex>.</ex>

A #Time when the #Cognizer remembers or fails to carry out an #Action.


<ex>He <t>remembered</t> <fex name="tim">afterwards</fex> to kiss her fingers.</ex>

The #Salient_entity is a person or thing that the #Cognizer needs to affect or effect when carrying out the #Action.

<ex>We piled into the taxi and right when we were about to leave, I realized we <t>forgot</t> <fex name="sal">the video camera</fex></ex>
This FE describes how often the Action is performed by the Cognizer.

The #Agent is the person (or other force) that causes the #Theme to move. 

<ex><fex name="Agent">The waiter</fex> <t>removed</t> the dishes from the table.</ex>

Theme is the object that changes location. 

<ex>The waiter <t>removed</t> <fex name="Theme">the dishes</fex> from the table. </ex>

The #Source is the initial location of the #Theme, before it changes location.

<ex>The waiter <t>removed</t> the dishes <fex name="Source">from the table</fex>.</ex>

A few of the words in this frame participate in an alternation between a #Theme object and a #Source object.

<ex>The waiter <t>cleared</t> <fex name="Thm">the dishes</fex> <fex name="Src">from the table</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The waiter <t>cleared</t> <fex name="Src">the table</fex> <fex name="Thm">of dishes</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The plumber <t>drained</t> <fex name="Thm">the water</fex> <fex name="Src">from the sink</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The plumber <t>drained</t> <fex name="Src"> the sink</fex> <fex name="Thm">of water</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The gardener <t>emptied</t> <fex name="Thm">the soil</fex> <fex name="Src">from the bucket</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The gardener <t>emptied</t> <fex name="Src">the bucket</fex> <fex name="Thm">of soil</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The army <t>evacuated</t> <fex name="Thm">the people</fex> <fex name="Src">from the tow

Any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal expresses the frame element #Path. In this frame, #Path expressions almost always have a <ment>via</ment>-sense. 

<ex>The army <t>evacuated</t> the townspeople <fex name="Path">through the tunnel</fex>. </ex>

The #Goal is the location where the #Theme ends up. This Frame Element is not profiled by words in this frame, though it may occasionally be expressed, as with the word <ment>remove</ment>.

<ex>Grandmother <t>removed</t> the fine china <fex name="Goal">to a safe place</fex>.</ex>

Any expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory of motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of speed, steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as Manner expressions.

<ex>The army <t>evacuated</t> the townspeople <fex name="Manner">efficiently</fex></ex>

The #Means is an act whereby the #Agent achieves the removal.

<ex>You ll have to <t>eject</t> it <fex name="Mns">by sticking an unfolded paperclip into that little hole</fex>.</ex>
Result of an event
Degree to which event occurs

The non-Agentive cause of the removing event.

<ex><fex name="Cause">The raging fire</fex> quickly <t>emptied</t> the square of all people.</ex>
<ex><fex name="Cause">Magnetic storms on the sun</fex> sometimes <t>eject</t> hot gas from beneath the surface.</ex>

The #Distance is any expression which characterizes the extent of motion.  This frame element occurs throughout the motion domain but is very infrequent in Motion_Noise.

The #Means_of_motion expresses the conveyance with which the #Agent effects the motion of the #Theme. They are usually expressed obliquely with  in  or  by .  <ex>We<t>evacuated</t> the population <fex name="Means_of_motion">by helicopter</fex>.</ex>

The #Cotheme is the second moving object, expressed as a direct object or an oblique.

<ex>Pat <t>removed</t> the jam from the fridge <fex name="Cotheme">along with the cheese</fex>.</ex>

The time at which the removal takes place.

The location where the removal takes place.

<ex>You just take the dishes and <t>rinse</t> them <fex name="pla">in the kitchen</fex>, okay?</ex>

The Explanation denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically follows. This often means that the Explanation causes the state of affairs expressed by the target, but not in all cases.
The tool the #Agent uses to remove the #Theme from its #Source.
This FE describes a participant of the state of affairs introduced by the target as being in some state during the action.

An event the punctuates the larger Removing event.

<ex><fex name="Co-timed_event">With a laugh</fex>, she <t>tore</t> a page from his diary.</ex>
The state of the world when the #Agent or #Cause removes the #Theme from the #Source.
To what end the #Agent or #Cause removes the #Theme.
Expressions marked with this extra-thematic FE modify a non-iterative use of the target, and indicate that it is conceived as embedded within an iterated series of similar events or states.
This FE is used to indicate the #Direction that the #Theme travels when it is removed.

The #Agent is the entity that does the emptying. 
<ex><fex name="Agent">Pat</fex> <t>cleared</t> the table of dishes.</ex>

The #Theme, when overtly expressed, invariably occurs in a PP Complement headed by "of".
<ex>Pat <t>cleared</t> the table <fex name="Thm">of dishes</fex>.</ex>

The #Path is any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal.
<ex>Kim <t>emptied</t> the basin <fex name="Path">over the edge of the balcony</fex>.</ex>

The #Goal is any expression which tells where the #Theme ends up, or would end up, as a result of the motion.

The #Means by which the #Agent empties the #Source.
The #Result of  the #Agent emptying the #Source.

<ex>I <t>peeled</t> the oranges <fex name="Inst">with a knife</fex>.</ex>
The #Cause is the non-sentient force which instigates the emptying. <ex><fex name="Cause">A basic washing</fex> can <t>degrease</t> <fex name="Source">your workclothes</fex>.</ex>

The location where the emptying takes place.

The time at which the emptying takes place.

This FE denotes an event that occurs or state of affairs that holds at a time that includes the time during which the event or state of affairs reported by the target occurs and of which it is taken to be a part.
The Explanation denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically follows. This often means that the Explanation causes the target s proposition, but not in all cases.
Circumstances describe the state of the world (at a particular time and place) which is specifically independent of the event itself and any of its participants.
The sentient entity causes the Artifact to not function.

An inanimate entity or force that renders the #Artifact non-functional.
The time at which the event takes place.
The place at which the event takes place.

A holistic description of the event (e.g. <ment>the same way</ment>), including depictions of the #Agent in terms of how the state of the #Agent affects the overall action (e.g <ment>maliciously</ment>).

Meaning: This frame element is defined as the number of times an event occurs per some unit of time. A Frequency expression answers the question how often. Degree to which event occurs

Any description of the purchasing event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). Money is the thing given in exchange for Goods in a transaction.

The #Speaker is the person who communicates their cessation of association with the #Content.

The idea that the #Speaker no longer associates with, whether it be an activity, a propostion, or a group.

<ex>Bonnie Charlie then <t>renounced</t> <fex name="con">his aspirations to the throne</fex>.</ex>

Any description of the renunciation which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). In addition, it may indicate salient characteristics of an #Speaker that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully</ment>). 

<ex>Your government then <fex name="man">coldly and completely</fex> <t>renounced</t> you.</ex>
An act whereby the #Speaker makes a statement of renunciation.

The emotional or physical state of the #Speaker that leads to their renunciation.

<ex>That  s when he finally <t>renounced</t> their friendship <fex name="int">in despair</fex>.</ex>

#Medium is the physical entity or channel used by the #Speaker to transmit the statement of renunciation.

<ex>Castro <t>renounced</t> all involvement with the group <fex name="med">over the radio</fex>.</ex>
The state of the #Speaker during the statement.
The time when the statement is made.
The FE specifies the place where the statement takes place.

This FE denotes an event that occurs or state of affairs that holds at a time that includes the time during which the event or state of affairs reported by the target occurs and of which it is taken to be a part.
The #Injured_party was affected by some previous wrongful act of the #Wrongdoer and who should benefit from the reparations.
The #Injury is the injurious action that  the #Wrongdoer committed against the #Injured_party.  Although conceptually present, this FE need not always be realized.
The #Wrongdoer makes amends to the #Injured_party for the #Injury.
The #Benefiting_action is performed by the #Wrongdoer to make amends.
It identifies the entity that the #Wrongdoer gives to the #Injured_party.

It marks any description of the #Wrongdoer's making of reparations not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification, (e.g. probably), and general descriptions comparing events (e.g. the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of a #Wrongdoer that also affect the action ( e.g. presumptuously).
It identifies the #Place where the #Wrongdoer makes amends.
It identifies the #Time when amends are made.
It identifies the #Purpose for which the #Wrongdoer makes restitution to the #Injured_party.
The extent to which the #Wrongdoer makes amends for the #Injury.

The person who is owed #Money by the #Debtor.

<ex>If you borrow, you ll have to <t>repay</t> <fex name="Loaner">the bank</fex></ex>

The person who is giving #Money to the #Loaner to return an earlier borrowed amount.

<ex><fex name="Debtor">I</fex> <t>paid</t> Johnson <t>back</t> for the movie ticket.</ex>

The amount of #Money that the #Debtor gives to the #Loaner, which may or may not be the full amount of the #Loan.

<ex><t>Pay</t> me ba<t></t>ck <fex name="Money">my 20 dollars</fex>!</ex>

A situation or a representative of a situation prior to repayment in which the #Debtor uses the #Loaner s money.

<ex>You must <t>repay</t> <fex name="Loan">the mortgage</fex> in full.</ex>

The level to which the Loan can be considered repaid in its entirety.

<ex>He wishes to <fex name="Degree">completely</fex> <t>repay</t> the loan.</ex>

When the #Debtor gives the #Loaner money.

<ex>Don t worry, I ll <t>pay</t> you <t>back</t> <fex name="Time">later</fex>.</ex>
The state of the world when the #Money is transfered.

How the #Debtor gives #Money to the #Loaner.

<ex>Paul <fex name="Manner">quietly</fex> <t>repaid</t> all of his debts and skipped town.</ex>

The physical location where the repayment takes place.

<ex>They <t>repaid</t> Lenny <fex name="Place">in a dark alleyway</fex>.</ex>

What the <fex name="">Debtor</fex> does in order to repay the <fex name="">Loaner</fex>.

<ex>I <t>repaid</t> my loan by mowing their lawn once a week.</ex>

The  <fex name="Enemy">Enemy</fex> is the entity that fails to overtake the #Defender.

The #Defender is the land, government, and its people that the #Enemy fails to seize.

<ex><fex name="Defender">General Winter</fex> <t>repelled</t> invaders from Napoleon to Hitler.</ex>
This FE describes the intensity and extent of the repelling event.
The manner in which the #Defender repels the #Enemy.
The action by which the repelling event is made possible through the efforts of the #Defender.
The location where the #Defender repels the #Enemy.
The #Time when the #Defender succeeds to repel the #Enemy.
The reason why the #Defender repels the #Enemy.
The tool used by the #Defender to repel the #Enemy.

This FE refers to the #Invasion_act perpetrated by the #Enemy.

<ex><fex name="Defender">Spain</fex> pledged to <t>repel</t> <fex name="Invasion_act">any Allied invasion</fex>.</ex>
This FE describes the outcome of the repelling event.
An intentional action performed by the #Agent that accomplishes the replacement.
The conscious entity, generally a person, that performs actions resulting in the #New entity occupying the position.
An entity directed by the #Agent that interacts with an #New entity so that it ends up in the position.
This FE identifies where the #Agent installs the #New entity.
This FE identifies the purpose for which an #Agent places the #New entity in a position.
This FE identifies the time when the #Agent installs the New entity.

The #New entity is the person or thing that the #Agent sets to fill a #Role.

<ex>I don t know; perhaps you could <t>substitute</t> <fex name="New">regular sugar</fex>.</ex>

Any description of the event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification  secondary effects (<ment>quietly</ment>, <ment>loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). It may also indicate salient characteristics or states of an #Agent that also affect the action (<ment>presumptuously</ment>, <ment>coldly</ment>, <ment>deliberately</ment>, <ment>eagerly</ment>, <ment>carefully</ment>).
A state of affairs that the #Agent is responding to in placing the #New filler in a position.

The extent to which the #New entity is affected by the #Agent.  #Degrees of replacement are generally only possible when there are multiple #New and #Old entities.  <ex>He <t>replaced</t> the 6761 models <fex name="deg">entirely</fex> with about half as many 6800s.</ex>

The entity that formerly occupied the position.

<ex>If you <t>substitute</t> a 15" arm <fex name="old">for the 50cm one</fex>, it works pretty well.</ex>
<ex>Please <t>replace</t> <fex name="old">the broken fixture</fex> as soon as possible.</ex>

The category that the #New and #Old entities fit into as a result of the function they serve.

<ex>AN AUSTRALIAN state has proposed the country adopt a bill of rights and <t>replace</t> the Queen <fex name="rol">as head of state</fex> with an Australian president .</ex>
The #Informer reports the activities of the #Wrongdoer to the #Authorities.
The #Wrongdoer has his or her activities reported to the #Authorities.
The #Authorities are the officials, government or otherwise, who handle misbehavior.
The #Behavior is the action or actions for which the #Wrongdoer is reported.
The #Time when the #Informer reports the #Behavior of the #Wrongdoer.
The #Place is the location where the reporting occurs.
The #Purpose is the purpose for which the #Informer reports the #Wrongdoer.
The #Origin is the place where the #Representative was born or lived a salient part of her or his life.
The #Representative speaks for another.
The #Persistent_characteristic is a physiological characteristic or personality trait of the #Representative which is concieved of as persisting over time.
The #Descriptor is a temporary condition of the #Representative.
The #Age is the length of time the #Representative has been alive.
The #Ethnicity is the religious, racial, national, socio-economic or cultural group to which the #Representative belongs.
An expression indicating the context with which the #Representative is associated.
#Rank is the position in a hierarchy that a #Representative occupies within an organization.
This FE identifies the Place where the #Representative works.
The #Represented authorizes the #Representative to communicate on its behalf.
This FE identifies the #Type of #Representative.
The #Compensation is the payment that the #Representative receives for performing a task.

The #Contract_basis describes the conditions of employment with respect to permanency, hours per time period, or payment basis.

<ex>Smithers is a <fex name="cb">half-time</fex> <t>spokesperson</t> for Procteur et Gamble </ex>
The event, idea, or emotion evoked by the #Entity.

This FE describes the #Degree to which the #Entity represents the #Phenomenon.

<ex><fex name="Entity">That mural</fex> <t>is</t> <fex name="Degree">hardly</fex> <t>a symbol</t> <fex name="Phenomenon">of what we re all about!</fex></ex>
The time period in which the representing occurs.

This FE describes the means through which the representing occurs.
<ex><fex name="Phenomenon">What</fex> does <fex name="Entity">a black and white snake</fex> <t>symbolize</t> <fex name="Means">in a dream</fex>?</ex>
An object that has some association with a #Phenomenon.
The #Cognizer is the person or group of people who believe in the representation.
The #Frequency denotes how often the #Entity is associated with the #Phenomenon.
The #Explanation denotes a proposition from which the represenation logically follows.
The #Place where the representing event occurs.

The #Speaker, as in other communication frames, is generally an External Argument. 

<ex><fex name="Speaker">The judge</fex> <t>ordered</t> the plaintiff to return the money.</ex>

In this frame the #Addressee can either occur as an NP Object (usually with a following complement clause) or as a PP Complement of verbs or nouns.

<ex>The child <t>implored</t> <fex name="Addressee">her parents</fex> to let her stay up late.</ex>
<ex>I <t>pleaded</t> <fex name="Addressee">with the bus driver</fex> to let me on without paying.</ex>
<ex>I made an <t>appeal</t> <fex name="Addressee">to the passers-by</fex> to help me.</ex>

The #Message is the content of the request that can be expressed as a quote, in a finite or non-finite clausal Complement, an NP Object or PP Complement.
<ex><fex name="Message">"I d like an extension,"</fex> <t>begged</t> Pat.</ex>
<ex>The directors <t>requested</t> <fex name="Message">that Pat resign</fex>.</ex>
<ex>Pat <t>begged</t> them <fex name="Message">to reconsider</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The students <t>requested</t> <fex name="Message">an extension of the deadline</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The offender <t>begged</t> <fex name="Message">for clemency</fex>.</ex>

The #Topic is rarely expressed in this frame but can occur as a PP Complement headed by <ment>about</ment>.

<ex>Can <fex name="Speaker">I</fex> make a <t>request</t> <fex name="Topic">about the content of the lessons</fex>?.</ex>

The #Medium is the physical entity or channel used to transmit the #Message. The #Medium is frequently expressed as a PP Complement headed by <ment>on</ment> or <ment>in</ment>. 
<ex>The parents of the missing child made an <t>appeal</t> <fex name="Medium">on television</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The parents of the missing child made an <t>appeal</t> <fex name="Medium">in the papers</fex>.</ex>

#Manner indicates the manner in which the #Message is delivered.

<ex>Don t stop, " he <t>commanded</t> <fex name="Manr">huskily</fex>.</ex>
<ex>"Maybe that was the basic problem," she <t>told</t> him <fex name="Manr">wearily</fex>.</ex>

An act performed by the #Speaker that results in a request being made and received.

<ex>He <t>asked</t> for food <fex name="Mns">by holding his hand out with a doleful expression</fex>.</ex>

The interval during which the #Speaker makes the request.

<ex><fex name="Speaker">I</fex> <t>urged</t> <fex name="Add">him</fex> <fex name="Message">to concede</fex> <fex name="Time">yesterday</fex>.</ex>

This extra-thematic FE applies to participants that are expected to derive a benefit from the occurrence of the event specified by the target predicate.

<ex><fex name="Speaker">I</fex> <t>asked</t> <fex name="Addressee">him</fex> <fex name="Message">to get that</fex> <fex name="Beneficiary">for you</fex>.</ex>
It denotes an event that occurs, or a state of affairs that holds, at a time that includes some time that the request was occuring.

The frame element #Iterations is used for expressions that indicate the number of times an event or state (of the kind denoted by the target in its clause) has taken place or held.

<ex><fex name="Speaker">I</fex> <t>asked</t> <fex name="Iterations">twice</fex>.</ex>

This FE describes a participant of the state of affairs introduced by the target as being in some state during the action. The depicted state does not necessarily or usually facilitate or cause the state of affairs reported by the target.

<ex><fex name="Depictive">Glancing out the window</fex>, <fex name="Speaker">she</fex> <t>asked</t> <fex name="Add">me</fex> <fex name="Message">to hand her the cane and assist her down the stairs</fex>.</ex>

The #Customer is the person or business ordering the #Entity from the #Supplier.

<ex><fex name="Cust">Simone</fex> <t>ordered</t> a hamburger and fries.</ex>

The object ordered by the #Customer.

<ex>Liz <t>ordered</t> <fex name="Ent">a new espresso maker</fex> for the office.</ex>

<ex>His <t><fex name="Ent">order</fex></t> did not arrive on time.</ex>

The channel used by the #Customer to transmit the request.

<ex>Harold <t>ordered</t> the material <fex name="Med">via email</fex>.</ex>

The person or organization from whom the #Customer orders the #Entity.

<ex>Mrs. Apfelbaum <t>ordered</t> a coffee <fex name="S">from the barista</fex>.</ex>

The #Time at which the #Customer requested the #Entity.

<ex>Sara placed the <t>order</t> <fex name="Time">three days ago</fex>. </ex>

The person or organization which benefits from the #Entity.

<ex>Rose <t>ordered</t> a new computer <fex name="Bene">for Mr. Cooper</fex>.</ex>

The Manner in which the request is placed.

<ex>Mr. Shaw <fex name="Man">hastily</fex> <t>ordered</t> the first thing he saw on the menu.</ex>

An action performed by the #Customer that results in a request being made.

<ex>Cheri accidently <t>ordered</t> the jacket <fex name="Means">by clicking on the link</fex>.</ex>
The state-of-affairs which prevents #Negative_consequences.
An event or state of affairs that results if the required #Required_situation does not occur and which impacts some deprofiled entity in a way that the speaker finds undesirable.
The FE #Circumstances encodes a setting, often temporal or spatial, within which the requirement holds.
The event or state of affairs that is achieved by bringing about the #Required_situation and which entails the non-occurrance of #Negative_consequences.

The period during which the #Required_situation is necessary to prevent negative consequences.

<ex>He was told that <fex name="tim">when he got back</fex> , his column <t>needed</t> a serious rethink .</ex>

The location within which the #Required_situation is required.

<ex><fex name="pla">In California</fex> , seatbelts <t>must</t> be fastened at all times .</ex>

The reason why the #Required_situation is necessary.

The degree to which the #Required_situation is necessary.  The #Degree may either imply a modification of the direness of the #Negative_consequences, the probability of the #Negative_consequences (if the #Required_situation is not made to hold), or both.

<ex>He <fex name="deg">absolutely</fex> <t>must</t> be replaced .</ex>

The living being who is rescued by the #Agent.

An event that occurs which could result in injury or harm to the #Patient or #Asset.

The way in which the #Agent rescues the #Patient or #Asset.

The location at which the #Agent rescues the #Patient or #Asset.

The setting in which the rescuing act takes place.

The tool with which the #Agent saves the #Patient or #Asset.

The means by which the #Agent rescues the #Patient or #Asset.

The purpose for which the #Agent rescues the #Patient or #Asset.

<ex>You know he only <t>saved</t> the dog <fex name="Purpose">to get close to Miranda</fex>.</ex>
A state of affairs that the #Agent is responding to in performing the action.

The extent to which the #Patient or #Asset is actually saved.

The people engaged in a research endeavor.

An area of inquiry.

<ex></ex>

A significant unanswered open proposition which the #Researcher is attempting to resolve.

<ex>When we have <t>researched</t> <fex name="que">why Brazilian mothers have stopped breastfeeding</fex>, principal reasons given are  poor milk  and  insufficient milk  .</ex>

A phenomenon or idea involved in a #Question.

The time when  the research is carried out.

<ex><fex name="tim">During summer of 1999</fex>, I did <t>research</t> using a technique called "Path Integral Monte
Carlo", to simulate quantum particles.</ex>

The experimentations, observations, or other procedures performed by the #Researcher in order to find an answer to the #Question.

A group of entities that are studied by the #Researcher to answer the #Question. The studied group need not be the only kind of entity that provides evidence for answering the research #Question.

Any description of the event (or state) which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously),  general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may indicate salient characteristics of the Researcher that also affect the action (deliberately, eagerly, carefully).

needed to accomplish all of our goals.</ex>

The #Type, or subclass of research.

The entity that contacts the #Organization about retainment of #Services.
The goods or labor that the #Client requests the #Organization preserve for future consumption or rendering.

Any description of the event as a whole ("the same way") or a characteristic of the #Booker during the action that holistically affects the event ("sloppily").

The #Deformer is the one who does the reshaping.

<ex><fex name="Def">The lieutenant</fex> <t>crushed</t> it angrily with his boot before looking back at Hencke.</ex>
This FE identifies the #Instrument with which the #Deformer affects the #Patient.  <ex>The lieutenant <t>crushed</t> it angrily <fex name="Ins">with his boot</fex> before looking back at Hencke.</ex>

The FE #Manner identifies the manner in which an #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.  <ex>The lieutenant <t>crushed</t> it <fex name="Mnr">angrily</fex> with his boot before looking back at Hencke.</ex>
The FE #Means identifies the means by which the #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.

The #Patient is the entity acted on and that undergoes a change.  <ex>Jack plucked the flower out of his morning coat and closed his fist slowly over it , <t>crushing</t> <fex name="Patient">it</fex> into a pulp.</ex>
The #Place indicates where the #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.

This FE identifies the purpose for which the #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.  <ex>What  s more , when you  ve finished with it simply wipe it clean and then <t>fold</t> it flat<fex name="Purp"> for easy storage</fex>.</ex>
The FE #Time identifies when the #Deformer intentionally affects the #Patient.  <ex>The lieutenant <t>crushed</t> it angrily with his boot <fex name="Time">before looking back at Hencke</fex>.</ex>
The #Result is the shape the #Patient becomes.  <ex>Jack plucked the flower out of his morning coat and closed his fist slowly over it , <t>crushing</t> it <fex name="Result">into a pulp</fex>.</ex>

The #Resistant_surface is the surface against which a #Deformer presses the #Patient.  <ex>Michael <t>flattened</t> the can <fex name="Res_surf">against his head</fex> . </ex> <ex>She <t>crushed</t> her cigarette <fex name="Res_surf">in the ashtray</fex> and stood up to go.</ex>

The #Locus is the locus of the reshaping action; it is essentially a simultaneous #Instrument and #Resistant_surface.

<ex>Russell <t>crumpled</t> the paper cups <fex name="Locus">in his fist</fex>.</ex>

The #Cause is an animate or inanimate entity, a force, or event that produces an effect. Volitionality is not a necessary characteristic of #Causes.  <ex><fex name="Cause">The strong winds</fex> <t>deformed</t> the structure of the outhouse.</ex> <ex><fex name="Cause">The rockslide</fex> <t>squashed</t> our summer villa.</ex>
The FE #Iterations indicates the number of times the reshaping has occurred.
The #Explanation indicates a state of affairs that the #Deformer is responding to in performing the reshaping.
The degree to which the #Patient is reshaped. <ex>The steamroller <t>flattened</t> my shoes <fex name="Degr">completely</fex>.</ex>
The part of the #Patient which is directly affected by the reshaping. <ex>He <t>warped</t> the steering rack <fex name="Subr">on the left side</fex>.</ex>
The location that the #Patient ends up in.

This FE denotes an event that occurs or state of affairs that holds at a time that includes the time during which the event or state of affairs reported by the target occurs and of which it is taken to be a part.
The conditions under which the #Patient is shaped.  <ex><fex name="Cause">The machine</fex> <t>crushed</t> <fex name="Patient">rocks</fex> <fex name="Circumstances">in the baking heat</fex>.</ex>

The state of the #Patient with respect to the change that the #Deformer brings about by making the adjustment.  <ex>You should <t>fold</t> the contraption <fex name="imp">to fit in the bag</fex>.</ex>
A state that holds of the #Patient or a relation that holds among the constituent parts of the #Patient as a result of the arranging action.
The #Agent finds the solution or explanation to the outstanding mystery or #Problem.
The #Problem is the predicament or mystery that is resolved.
The #Cause is the non-Agentive event or state of affairs that brings about the resolution of the #Problem.
The #Means is an intermediate action taken by the #Agent in order to resolve the #Problem.
It indicates the #Time at which the #Problem is resolved.
It indicates the location at which the #Problem is resolved.
The #Degree to which the #Agent or #Cause resolves the problem.

Any description of the resolution, such as secondary effects (quietly) or comparisons of events (the same way). In agentive cases,  #Manner may also describe salient characteristics of the #Agent which affect the action.(carefully, diligently, deliberately etc. )

It is used for any expression which implies a definite starting-point of motion.In prepositional phrases, the prepositional object expresses the starting point of motion.  With particles, the starting point of motion is understood from context.
It is used for any description of a trajectory of motion which is neither a #Source nor a #Goal.
It is used for any expression which tells where the #Self_mover ends up as a result of the motion.

Any expression which describes a property of motion which is not directly related to the trajectory or rate of motion expresses the frame element #Manner. Descriptions of steadiness, grace, means of motion, and other things count as #Manner expressions.
Any expression which characterizes the extent of motion expresses the frame element #Distance.

It is used for expressions which describe a general area in which motion takes place when the motion is understood to be irregular and not to consist of a single linear path.  Note that this FE should not be used for cases when the same phrase could be used with the same meaning with a non-motion target, since these should be annotated with the #Place FE.
The time when the motion occurs.
An entity whose motion is correlated with that of the #Self_mover, following and tracking the #Self_mover, being followed and tracked, or with both parties mutually matching #Paths.
The rate at which the location of the #Self_mover changes with respect to time.
Depictive phrase describing the actor of an action.
An act whereby the #Self_mover achieves movement.
Result of an event.
The emotional or mental state of the #Self_mover which motivates them toward motion or the particular manner of motion.
The amount of time for which a state holds or a process is ongoing.
It identifies the purpose for which a #Self_mover moves.

The #Place is the location within which a defined motion takes place.  Any specified or implied  #Source, #Path or #Goal should designate a location contained with the #Place. This FE can be differentiated from #Area by the fact that the annotated phrase can be used in the same meaning with non-motion targets.
The state of affairs that leads to the particular motion that the #Self_mover adopts.
It is something in the external environment that causes the #Self_mover  to move.
The direction that the #Self_mover heads in during the motion.

The label #Coordinated_event is to be used for phrases denoting an event-it does not allow states-that the Traversing is rhythmically aligned with. The #Coordinated_event is conceived of as independent: it would occur regardless of the event expressed by the target, which is not even an incidental or optional sub-part of the #Coordinated_event.
The shape of the overall #Path travelled by the #Self_mover.
An event or circumstance that would not be expected given the nature of the particular Self_motion event.

This is the recipient of the sent #Theme.

The #Purpose of the sending.

When the sending takes place

An additional theme sent along with the main #Theme.

A container in which the #Theme is sent.

This FE is only expressed with certain nouns in this frame, and then only with the help of a support verb.
This is the entity or phenomenon which gives rise to the sensation. In cases of veridical sensation, this FE is not typically distinguished from #Percept.

The FE #Percept is used for phrases that express the characteristic property of a sensation. Typically this characteristic property is described with reference to the entity or phenomenon that produces the sensation---that  is why this FE can be difficult to distinguish from Source. It is possible for Source and Percept to be expressed separately, however: 
<ex><fex name="Source">This herb</fex> <gov>gives off</gov> a <t>smell</t> <fex name="Percept">of garlic</fex>.</ex>
 In cases in which it is impossible to distinguish between Source and Percept, Percept is used as the default FE.

This FE is assigned to phrases expressing the body part in which a sensation is located. Since touch is the least localized of sense modalities, words relating to haptic sensations are the ones most likely to occur with this FE: 
<ex>I have a tingling <t>feeling</t> <fex name="Body_part">in my hands</fex>.</ex>
 Words for other sense modalities can occasionally express this FE as well:
<ex>There is a bitter <t>taste</t> <fex name="Body_part">on the back of my tongue</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The ringing <t>sound</t> <fex name="Body_part">in my left ear</fex> distracted me during class. </ex>
<def-root>A characterization of the sensation not covered by a more specific FE.</def-root>
This FE is the perceptual background against which the Phenomenon is experienced by the Perceiver.
The #Time when the sensation is perceived.
This FE describes how strong the sensation is.

The #Whole is a single entity or an aggregate of entities which is separated into #Parts.  It is usually the NP Object of a target verb. 
<ex>The directors <t>split</t> <fex name="Whole">the company</fex> in two.</ex>
<ex> The teacher <t>divided</t> <fex name="Whole">the children</fex> into groups. </ex>

This refers collectively to the Parts resulting from separation of a Whole:
<ex>The directors <t>split</t> the company <fex name="Parts">in two</fex>.</ex>
<ex>The teacher <t>divided</t> the children <fex name="Parts">into groups</fex>.</ex>
 <ex>The teacher <t>separated</t> the children <fex name="Parts">from each other</fex>. </ex>

Part-1 is the first of two Parts mentioned. This is most often the Object of a verb. 
<ex>First, <t>separate</t> <fex name="Part_1">the yolks</fex> from the whites. </ex>
#Part_2 is the second of two #Parts mentioned. This is usually a PP Complement. First, <ex><t>separate</t> the yolks <fex name="Part_2">from the whites</fex>. </ex>

With causative uses of these verbs, an Agent separates or divides something.  The Agent is usually expressed as the External Argument: 
<ex><fex name="Agent">The researcher</fex> <t>divided</t> subjects into groups. </ex>

This frame element expresses a property of the Parts or components of the Whole which is used as the basis for separation. Criterion is typically expressed as a PP headed by <ment>by</ment>, or as a complex PP of the form <ment>on the basis of</ment>.... 
<ex>The researcher <t>divided</t> subjects into groups <fex name="Criterion">on the basis of eye color</fex>.</ex>
As with the frame General.Joining (above), words in this frame can be used statively, as in <ment>The rooms are separated by a partition</ment>, inchoatively, as in <ment>The group separated</ment> or causatively, as in <ment>I separated the laundry</ment>.

This FE identifies any #Depictive phrase describing the #Agent who separates or the undergoers of the separation.
<ex><fex name="Depictive">Naked</fex>, <fex name="Agent">Selma Bouvier</fex> <t>separated</t> <fex name="Part_1">the yolks</fex> <fex name="Part_2">from the whites</fex>.</ex>
Manner of performing an action
Degree to which event occurs

<ex>You can <t>bisect</t> an angle <fex name="Mns">by drawing three circles</fex>.</ex>
This FE identifies the #Result of an event.
The #Cause is the non-agent that brings about the separation.

An event paired with the motion, which explains why the motion is expected. In particular, #Reciprocation is used to indicate an action that is being rewarded or punished by the motion, and/or is paired with the motion as the other side of an agreement.
An event that occurs or state of affairs that holds at the time of departure and which the departure is taken to be a part of.

The state of the world (at a particular time and place) which is specifically independent of the departing event itself and any of its participants, and is merely peripherally related to the event as a whole.

An entity that is construed as a single point source emitting sound.

<ex>He woke up because of the <t>cries</t> <fex name="Sound_source">of the crows outside</fex>.</ex>

The place from which the sound emanates.

<ex>There followed a small silence that was interrupted by a distant <t>cries</t> of caged birds <fex name="Location_of_sound_source">from the interior</fex>.</ex>

The location at which sound is produced. This FE differs from #Location_of_sound_source in that it does not highlight the sound s spreading from its source to the perceiver s location, which is usually indicated by the preposition "from".

<ex>The <t>hiss</t> of snakes <fex name="Place">outside the tent</fex> was a constant source of worry.</ex>

The noise-making may be prompted by either some outside phenomenon or occurrence, or by an #Internal_cause,  that is the mental or emotional state of an animate #Sound_source.

<ex>We proceeded despite his stifled <t>cries</t> <fex name="Internal_cause">of pain</fex>.</ex>

Certain properties of the sound relating to its production, loudness, etc  may be of lexicographic interest if they describe properties of a sounds as such: loudly, shrilly, etc.

<ex>The Brigadier had heard the <fex name="Manner">faint</fex> <t>squeak</t> of rats.</ex>
Expressions that indicate the loudness of the sound.
This FE idntifies the <fex name="Explanation">Explanation</fex> that the #Sound_source produces the sound. Generally, this is some external stimulus that prompts the #Sound_source to make noise.

The #Path along which the sound travels away from the #Sound_source.

<ex>The books he wrote later tell how he never forgot the <t>howl</t> of the wolf <fex name="Path">across the icy field of Otsego</fex> on cold winter nights.</ex>
How often the Vocalization event occurs.

This is the person who is characterized as talkative, reticent etc.  It is usually the External Argument: 
<ex><fex name="Spkr">Pat</fex> has been <t>silent</t> on this issue.</ex>

The #Company in which the #Speaker exhibits a certain communicative behavior.  In this frame, #Company occurs in PP Complements headed by <ment>with</ment>: 
<ex>Kim was <t>reticent</t> <fex name="Company">with me</fex> about her family.</ex>

#Text is rarely expressed because the quantity of information given is the focus of the frame, rather than the information content. Texts can occur as NP objects, but cannot be either direct quotes or complement clauses.

<ex>Kim gave a hesitant, <t>reticent</t> <fex name="Text">account</fex>.</ex>

This FE is the #Topic on which much or little information is communicated. #Topic is far more frequent than Message in this frame. 
<ex>Kim is very <t>talkative</t> <fex name="Top">about her family and childhood</fex>.</ex>

#Medium is the physical entity or channel used to communicate,  as in other Communication frames.  It is usually a PP Complement headed by <ment>in</ment> or <ment>on</ment>.

<ex>Kim is <t>talkative</t> <fex name="Medium">on the phone</fex>.</ex>

This frame element selects some gradable attribute and modifies the expected value for it.
The #Speaker produces the #Message to alert the #Addressee as to possible danger.
The #Addressee receives the warning from the #Speaker.
The #Message is the communication produced by the #Speaker.
The #Topic is a general description of the content of the #Message.

The #Means describes the way the #Speaker accomplishes the task of warning the #Addressee.
