The time period during which the #Speaker warns the #Addressee.
The location in which the #Speaker warns #Addressee.

<def-root>This FE indicates the <fen>Communicative_force</fen> or authority with which the <fen>Message</fen> is expressed (often denoted by words such as "officially," "formally," "technically," etc.). 

<ex>She has yet to <m>receive</m> <fex name="Cf">official</fex> <t>warning</t>.</ex></def-root>
A characteristic or description of the telling event or of the #Speaker or #Addressee.
It indicates the number of times an event or state (of the kind denoted by the target in its clause) has taken place or held.
The #Cognizer is the person who repeatedly changes their mind about which of the #Options to choose.
The #Explanation denotes a proposition from which it logically follows that the #Cognizer keeps changing their mind about the #Issue.
The #Options are the alternative courses of action or the alternative physical or concrete entities that the #Cognizer can choose from.
It identifies the #Place where the #Cognizer keeps changing their mind between the #Options that present themselves.
It denotes the #Time interval during which the #Cognizer keeps changing their mind about which of the #Options to select.

Any description of the selecting event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including general descriptions comparing events (the same way) and salient characteristics of the #Cognizer that also affect the action.
The #Issue is a question about a course of action or a choice between items.

When there is an explicitly separate construal of the #Options, #Option_1 is the first-mentioned alternative, typically in the form of a from-PP. When it is clear that  the #Cognizer actually acted on their choice, #Option_1 is the alternative they embraced first before pursuing #Option_2.

When there is an explicitly separate construal of the #Options, #Option_2 is the second-mentioned alternative, typically in the form of a to-PP. When it is clear that  the #Cognizer actually acted on their choice, #Option_2 is the alternative they embraced after abandoning #Option_1.

In the cases where the #Cognizer does not act on their choice, the #Duration denotes the length of time from the beginning of the #Cognizer s deliberations to the end. In situations where the #Cognizer does act on the #Options, the #Duration denotes the length of the interval during which the #Cognizer repeatly changes from one option to the other.
It describes the number of times within a given period that the #Cognizer wavers.
The #Degree to which the #Cognizer wavers.

It denotes an event that occurs or state of affairs that holds at a time that includes the time during which the event or state of affairs reported by the target occurs and of which it is taken to be a part.
Circumstances describe the state of the world (at a particular time and place) which is specifically independent of the event itself and any of its participants.
The individual or individuals whose wealthiness is being described.
A group which has or lacks possession of some resource.
The degree of wealthiness or poverty of the #Person or #Institution.
A characterization of the entity, usually money, that the #Person or the #Institution possesses.
An entity prototypically used by a #Wielder to cause damage.
The type of activity that the #Weapon is generally involved in.  Often this can be considered a kind of #Type specification also.
It indicates what subtype of the general category the #Weapon belongs to.
The substance that makes up the #Weapon.
The person (or other sentient entity) that is using the #Weapon.
It identifies a part of the #Weapon. This includes permanent, obligatory parts and mere attachments.
The term used to refer to an #Weapon.
The time at which a #Weapon comes into existence.
The individual or group responsible for the creation of the #Weapon.
A description or characteristic of the #Weapon.
The person whose clothing is under discussion.

The body part of the #Wearer which is covered by the #Clothing.
A characterization of how completely the clothing status holds.
A characterization of the impression given by the #Wearer s clothing status.
The time at or during which the #Wearer has the #Clothing on.
NB: This FE will be mapped to Intended_wearing_locationThe location that the #Wearer exits while wearing the #Clothing.
The location whose characteristics or state the #Clothing of the #Wearer was intended to suit.  This FE is only possible with wear.v.
The state-of-affairs that the #Wearer wishes to bring about.
The location relative to the body of the #Wearer that the #Clothing occupies.  Note that in many cases, the location is defined relative to other clothing.
This FE identifies the #Place where the weather occurs.
This FE identifies the #Time when the weather occurs.
This FE identifies a further #Specification of the weather conditions.
The #Whole is the larger entity that includes the #Part.
The #Part is either a subset or a constituent part of the #Whole.
Any description of the inclusion event which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way).
The #Time at which the inclusion relation holds.
The location at which the inclusion relation holds.

It identifies the #Time when the #Cognizer is willing to engage in the #Activity.
The state of affairs that the #Cognizer wants to achieve by being willing to engage in the #Activity.
A modifier expressing  the deviation of the willingness from the norm or from the value for another #Cognizer.

The individual or team who scores the point.
Some characteristic of the #Athlete.
The goal of the #Athlete while performing the move.

Some specific manner of performing the move.

The individual or individuals involved in the #Competition.
A quantity whereby progress is measured during the game, and #Rank and #Prizes are awarded to the #Competitor afterward.
The amount by which the #Competitor's and #Scores differ.
The rank (according to #Score) that a #Competitor achieves.
A socially and/or monetarily significant entity which is given to a #Competitor according to #Score or #Rank.
An action of the #Competitor that results in the outcome of the #Competition.

Any description of the #Competitor which is not covered by more specific FEs, including epistemic modification (probably, presumably, mysteriously), secondary effects (quietly, loudly), and general descriptions comparing events (the same way). It may also indicate salient characteristics of a #Competitor that also affect their action (presumptuously, coldly, deliberately, eagerly, carefully).
When the #Competition takes place.
The location where the #Competition takes place.

The event in which the #Competitor competes.
The reason why the #Competitor wins the #Competition.
The length of time from when winning events began to be repeated to when they stopped.
The individual that the #Competitor has been competing against.
The state of the world when the #Competitor wins the #Competition.
The frame expressed by the target typically corresponds to a #Means action within the frame expressed by the #Re-encoding, but not necessarily.
The state-of-affairs that prevails as a result of the #Competitor winning the #Competition.
It is used for expressions that indicate the number of times the #Competitor wins the #Competition.

<def-root>This FE indicates the <fen>Communicative_force</fen> or authority with which the winning event operates (often denoted by words such as "officially," "formally," "technically," etc.). </def-root>
It applies to appraisals of the event, typically a judgment of its expectedness, or a description of the state-of-affairs introduced by the winning event.
This FE is for the named venue of a competition, particularly when the place has been built for the purpose of a #Competition.

The individual or individuals that are engaged or are scheduled to be engaged in an #Activity.

<ex>Instead, <fex name="par">he</fex> was challenged by Neil Gaudry, and <t>withdrew</t> from the race when it appeared that he would not be victorious.</ex>

The event that the Participant is engaged in or was scheduled to be engaged in.


<ex> In any event , in mid-April he <t>withdrew</t> <fex name="act">from the contest</fex>. </ex>

The state-of-affairs that the #Participant hopes to bring about by withdrawing

Expressions marked with this extra-thematic FE modify a non-iterative use of the target, and indicate that it is conceived as embedded within an iterated series of similar events or states. In addition, most expressions of Particular_iteration indicate which instance of the series is being referred to.
The state of the world (at a particular time and place) which is independent of the the attempt of the #Agent to achieve the #Goal.
The domain or area within which the work towards the #Goal belongs.
An entity that is centrally involved in the #Goal that the #Agent is attempting to acheive.
How often the #Agent works.
This FE applies to appraisals of the event, typically a judgment of its expectedness.
#Descriptor covers any characterization or description of the target that is not covered by another more specific FE.
The #Agent is assigned to a #Post to perform a task involving a #Salient_entity.

This FE identifies the place where the #Agent staffs the #Post.

<ex><t>Working</t> the front desk <fex name="Place">at a real estate office</fex> is not as fulfilling as it might seem.</ex>

This FE identifies the purpose for which the #Agent works at the #Post.

<ex>We will be <t>staffing</t> a booth <fex name="Purpose">to let everyone know about our upcoming events.</fex></ex>

This FE identifies the time when the #Agent works at the #Post.

<ex>Police manned the border <fex name="Time">from 3 to 5pm</fex>.</ex>

<ex>Jason <t>manned</t> the booth <fex name="Means">by handing out brochures and greeting visitors.</fex></ex>

Any description of the intentional act which is not covered by more specific FEs, including secondary effects (<ment>quietly, loudly</ment>), and general descriptions comparing events (<ment>the same way</ment>). The #Frequency with which the #Agent works in a given period of time.
The length of time from when the event denoted by the target began to be repeated to when it stopped.
The #Result of working at the Post.
Expressions marked with this extra-thematic FE modify a non-iterative use of the target, and indicate that it is conceived as embedded within an iterated series of similar events or states.

The Explanation denotes a proposition from which the main clause (headed by the target) logically follows. This often means that the Explanation causes the state of affairs expressed by the target, but not in all cases.
This FE gives a description of the working event.

<ex>Sue was <t>staffing</t> <fex name="pos">the entrance</fex> when everything started to go wrong.</ex>

The #Salient_entity is centrally involved in the task the #Agent is assigned to perform. It is normally located at the #Post.

<ex>You ll be <t>working</t> <fex name="sal">the phones</fex>.</ex>
